title: Graphic Designer (Virtual Assistant)
description:
Job Title: Graphic Designer (Virtual Assistant)



About the company



You will be working with a Canadian supplement brand (protein powder, creatine, pre-workout) currently undergoing a full turnaround under new ownership. The team is small but fast-moving, rebuilding its Amazon presence, shopify, website, retail footprint, and social channels simultaneously.



What you'll do



Produce graphics for Amazon listings, the Shopify website, Meta ads, and retail/print materials

Work through a shared project management queue and deliver assets fast

Collaborate daily with the in-house graphic designer and digital marketing director

Support ongoing brand refresh work, packaging updates, promotional banners, social creatives

Accept feedback quickly and iterate without lengthy back-and-forth



What we're looking for



Strong portfolio demonstrating e-commerce and consumer brand design

Fast, reliable output — quality without sacrificing speed

Comfortable with tools such as Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator) or Canva Pro

Experience in the health, wellness, or fitness space is a plus

Able to work EST business hours (Toronto-based team)



Skills:



Adobe Photoshop

Adobe Illustrator

Canva

E-commerce assets

Brand design

Fast turnaround

Experience with modern AI tools for faster and more efficient production is a strong plus.



Rate: $1,000/month

Schedule: Full-time, 40 hours/week , EST

Requirement: Minimum 2 years of experience as a Graphic Designer (Virtual Assistant)



Important:

*Only applicants who meet the requirements will be considered.

title: SaaS Project Manager Intern (Remote)
description:
Who We Are



We’re Pearl Lemon — a UK-based digital growth agency (Company No.
, London), founded in 2016 by Deepak Shukla (ex-Deloitte, TEDx speaker, 
 contributor).



We’ve grown into a global remote team of 130+ people across 30+ countries, working with clients worldwide.



1,000+ inbound leads every month

1,000+ 5-star reviews across platforms

Multiple brands including SEO, PR, SaaS, accounting, legal, and gaming



We don’t just manage projects — we build businesses.



About the Role



We’re hiring a SaaS Project Manager Intern to support our growing number of internal and client-facing SaaS projects.



This is a hands-on role, not a passive internship.



You’ll be working directly with our team to help manage and launch real tools, systems, and digital products.



Your Responsibilities



Assist in managing SaaS projects from planning to launch

Coordinate with developers, designers, and marketers

Track progress, deadlines, and deliverables

Use tools like Hubstaff, Trello, and Slack

Help identify delays or issues and suggest solutions

Support the launch of new features, tools, and workflows



You’ll be involved in real work that impacts real clients.



What We’re Looking For



Strong attention to detail and organization

Good written and spoken English

Reliable internet and ability to work remotely

Interest in SaaS, tech, or startups

Self-starter attitude (you don’t wait to be told everything)



Nice to have:



Experience with project management tools

Any internship, freelance, or academic project experience



We value attitude and willingness to learn more than experience.



What You’ll Get



Real-world SaaS experience (not just theory)

Training through Pearl Lemon Academy

Exposure to international clients and systems

Opportunity to grow into a full-time role

Work with a global team across different industries



If you perform well, this role can lead to long-term paid opportunities within our company.



Work Environment & Culture



We are a fast-paced, remote-first company.



You’ll work with people from different countries

We value accountability and ownership

We move fast — “launch first, improve later”

Open communication and transparent systems



This is a great environment if you want to learn quickly and grow fast.



How to Apply



Apply directly via this platform You’ll receive a link to our official Pearl Lemon Application Form Submit the form and record a Loom video (minimum 5 minutes) ?? Applications without the Loom video (or under 5 minutes) will not be reviewed. Your application is only considered complete once both steps are submitted.

title: High-Earning Telesales Closer | Up to $3,000/month | US E-commerce Brand
description:
TELESALES REPRESENTATIVE - US E-COMMERCE BRAND



Remote Philippines | Full-time | Night Shift (US Hours)





ABOUT THE ROLE



A fast-growing US e-commerce brand specializing in premium products for US business customers is hiring 2 to 3 Telesales Representatives in the Philippines to handle warm leads and close deals over the phone.



This is a pure sales role, not customer support, not inbound call center. We are looking for people with native-like English, persistent follow-up discipline, and the ability to close deals.





KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



- Receive a daily list of warm leads, customers who have shown buying intent on our website

- Call leads within 10 to 30 minutes of receipt, uncover needs and handle objections

- Close deals over the phone or clearly identify what follow-up is needed

- Send personalized SMS and
s through our internal CRM

- Pursue each lead 6 to 8 times across multiple channels until they buy or clearly opt out

- Maintain detailed records of every customer interaction in the CRM

- Hit monthly sales KPIs





REQUIRED



- 3 to 5 years of telesales experience, preferably with US customers

- Native-like or near-native English with strong American accent preferred. Our customers are US small business owners and they will hear the difference. Natural and clear is required.

- Proven closer mentality, you measure success by deals closed not calls made

- Persistent and disciplined, you follow up 6, 7, 8 times without giving up

- Comfortable with consultative selling, our customers spend 1,000 USD plus and need guidance not pressure

- Self-disciplined remote worker with reliable home office setup, fast internet minimum 25 Mbps, and quiet environment

- CRM-savvy, quick learner with internal sales tools, can update notes during and after calls

- Comfortable with workplace tools such as Slack, Google Workspace, Zoom, OpenPhone, or similar VoIP





PREFERRED



- E-commerce or DTC sales background

- Experience selling visual or design products such as signage, print, branding

- Experience working with creative entrepreneurs or restaurant and retail SMB owners





NOT A FIT IF



- You prefer customer support or inbound-only roles

- You are uncomfortable with commission-heavy compensation

- You give up on leads after 1 or 2 unsuccessful calls

- You cannot sustain a night shift schedule from 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time

- You see "no" as failure instead of feedback





COMPENSATION STRUCTURE



2-Month Probation



- Reduced base salary plus 100 percent commission, same as full-time, earn full commission on every deal closed from day one

- Probation goal is to master the product, sales script, and follow-up process



After Probation, from Month 3



- Full base salary plus uncapped commission on closed revenue





REALISTIC INCOME EXPECTATIONS



- Hard workers who put in full hours and call volume earn minimum 1,500 USD per month

- KPI achievers earn 2,000 USD plus per month

- Top performers exceeding KPI earn 3,000 USD plus per month, with no cap



Commission structure is simple: the more deals you close, the more you earn, with no ceiling.





LONG-TERM OPPORTUNITIES FOR TOP PERFORMERS



- Performance-based revenue share program for outstanding contributors

- Career path: Telesales to Senior Closer to Team Lead to Sales Director





WORK SCHEDULE



- Monday to Friday: 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 6 PM US Eastern Time, full 9-hour shift

- Saturday: 9 PM to 1 AM Manila time, equivalent to 9 AM to 1 PM US Eastern Time, 4-hour half shift

- Total around 49 hours per week across 6 days



DAYS OFF



- Sundays every week

- Major US holidays such as Memorial Day, July 4, Labor Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year

- Major Philippine holidays





WHAT WE PROVIDE



- Warm leads daily, no cold calling, no list scraping

- Comprehensive sales playbook with proven scripts, objection handling, FAQ

- One-week paid training before you take customer calls

- Internal CRM with full lead context, mockup design, quote, customer history

- OpenPhone account with US phone number

- Dedicated Team Lead for daily coaching and support

- Clear performance metrics





APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS



To apply, please follow ALL these steps. Applications missing any step will be ignored.



1. SEND YOUR RESUME



Highlight relevant sales experience, specifically US customer experience, average deal size closed, and conversion rates if available.



2. RECORD AN AUDIO FILE, MINIMUM 2 MINUTES



Record yourself handling this scenario:



You are calling a customer named John who designed a 580 USD custom product on our website about 30 minutes ago, but has not placed the order yet. Record yourself making this discovery call. Your goal is to understand what is holding him back and offer a solution. You can pause briefly between turns to indicate John is responding.



We are listening for: accent, tone, pacing, discovery skills, objection handling, and natural conversation flow.



3. ANSWER THESE 3 SHORT QUESTIONS



- Describe the highest-value deal you have closed and how you closed it. How many follow-up attempts did it take?

- Why are you applying for this role specifically, not just any sales job?

- When can you start? Are you available for night shift, 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Sat?



4. CONFIRM YOU UNDERSTAND



- This is a commission-heavy sales role, not customer service

- Working hours are 9 PM to 6 AM Manila time, Mon-Fri full shift, Saturday half shift 9 PM to 1 AM

- You will be expected to follow up 6 to 8 times per lead, not give up after 1 or 2 calls

- The audio recording is the most important part of your application





HIRING PROCESS



We move fast for the right candidates:



- Step 1: Resume and audio screen, 2 to 3 days

- Step 2: 30-minute interview with our Team Lead via Zoom

- Step 3: Live mock call exercise with a hiring manager

- Step 4: Final interview and offer



Start date: ASAP



We are hiring 2 to 3 SDRs in this batch. Strong candidates will receive offers quickly.





WHY JOIN US



- Warm leads only, your time goes to closing not prospecting

- Real product, real demand, premium products with proven market fit

- Direct access to founders, no corporate bureaucracy

- Performance-based revenue share for top performers, your income scales with company growth

- Long-term career path: SDR to Senior SDR to Team Lead to Sales Director

- Build a remote sales career with a US e-commerce brand at scale





Apply now if you are a closer who is tired of low-ticket sales and ready to follow up until you earn what you are worth.

title: Market Development Representative (MDR) + Portfolio Support [Temp-to-hire]]
description:
About Vaycaay



Vaycaay is a vacation rental management and co-hosting company. We help short-term rental owners run high-performing listings while delivering a great guest experience.



Role overview



We are hiring a Market Development Representative (MDR). This is a part-time role focused on outbound market outreach and appointment setting to connect self-managing Airbnb hosts with our team.



This role will also support property success and guest experience tasks for our current Airbnb portfolio.



This is a temporary role with an initial 90-day engagement, with the potential for full-time or long-term employment based on performance.



Hours: 20 hours/week (4–5 hours/day)

Schedule: Must be able to work US/Eastern time hours

Work type: Remote





What you’ll do (primary: MDR / appointment setting)



- Conduct outbound outreach to identify and start conversations with self-managing Airbnb property owners who may benefit from a co-host.

- Use approved messaging and follow-up workflows to generate qualified opportunities.

- Book meetings for Account Executives (AEs) and ensure smooth handoff with clear notes and context.

- Keep outreach and pipeline activity organized and up to date.



What you’ll do (secondary: portfolio support)



- Assist with property success and guest experience for our Airbnb portfolio as needed.

- Help with day-to-day coordination tasks that improve guest satisfaction and listing performance.



Bonus eligibility (Host Bonus + AE Program)



This role is eligible for our bonus programs:



Host Bonus (company-wide)



- Monthly bonus pool funded by 10% of gross revenue generated from new properties acquired on or after April 18, 2026.

- Paid monthly after books/statements are closed.

- Split equally across eligible tea
mbers (not tied to being assigned to the specific properties).



MDR + AE bonus eligibility



For qualifying subscription deals:



- Upfront commission:30% of upfront earnings, split 50/50 between the MDR (sourced lead) and the AE/closer.

- Ongoing monthly AE bonus:10% of subscription gross revenue, split between MDR and AE/closer (or paid fully if the same person sourced and closed).



Requirements



- Fluent in English (written and spoken)

- Stable internet connection, with reliable video + audio for conference calls

- Comfortable with outbound outreach, follow-up, and appointment setting

- Organized, consistent, and able to hit daily activity goals within a part-time schedule

- Professional communication and ability to represent the Vaycaay brand



Nice to have



- Experience with short-term rentals (
)

- Experience with lead generation via communities (e.g.,
 groups), social outreach, or cold

- Experience working with CRMs, tracking spreadsheets, or Notion-based systems



Compensation



- $2–$4 USD per hour to start

- Bonus eligibility as outlined above



How to apply



Please submit:



- A short intro (why this role, and relevant experience)

- A brief summary of any appointment-setting or lead-generation results

- Your availability in US/Eastern time

- Confirmation of stable internet + ability to join video calls





Include the subject line: MDR — Vaycaay Application

title: Outreach & Lead Generation VA (LinkedIn + Email | Long-Term Opportunity | Mission-Driven)
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented and reliable Virtual Assistant to help support outreach and relationship-building with church leaders across Florida.



This is not just a task-based role. You will play a key part in helping connect leaders with a message focused on strengthening faith, resilience, and personal growth.



Responsibilities:

*Conduct targeted searches on LinkedIn to find church leaders (pastors, ministry leaders, event coordinators)

*Send personalized connection requests and follow-up messages

*Use Google to identify church staff pages and gather contact information

*Send thoughtful, relational
 outreach (no spam or mass messaging)

*Maintain and update a CRM spreadsheet daily

*Track outreach activity and responses



What We’re Looking For

*Strong written English skills (clear, natural, conversational tone)

*High attention to detail

*Ability to follow systems and processes consistently

*Comfortable working independently

description:

, London EC1V 2NX) led by Deepak Shukla (ex-Deloitte, TEDx speaker,

We’re a remote-first team of 130+ people across 30+ countries, generating over 1,000 inbound leads every month and backed by 1,000+ 5-star reviews.

Interest in digital marketing, SEO, or online business



Willingness to learn quickly and take initiative

Organized, detail-oriented, and proactive mindset





No prior experience required—but curiosity and consistency are a must.



???? What You’ll Gain



Real-world digital marketing experience



Training through Pearl Lemon Academy



Mentorship from experienced marketers



Exposure to international clients and campaigns



Opportunity to move into a paid role based on performance





 Work Culture



Remote-first, global team environment

title: Media Buyer
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Media Buyer to own our paid advertising performance across platforms, with a primary focus on Meta 
 & Instagram Ads). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelance or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is data-driven, detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with creatives to improve ad performance through clear insights and testing.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Launch, manage, and optimize ad campaigns primarily on Meta Ads. Support campaigns on Google, TikTok, or other platforms where relevant.

- Plan and execute structured tests (angles, creatives, offers, landing page) to improve cost per acquisition and ROAS.

- Manage budgets, audiences, and campaign structures based on performance

- Analyze ad performance to identify winning and underperforming ads

- Communicate clear performance insights to the creative team

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve creatives based on data

- Analyze Shopify sales data to identify scaling opportunities, conversion bottlenecks and product-level performance

- Monitor competitors’ ads, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC industry trends and platform updates to ensure best practices.

- Providing administrative support, as and when needed to the manager.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong comfort working with numbers and data

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain performance clearly to non-technical teammates

- Highly organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently

- Willing to learn quickly and adapt as the business grows



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Media Buyer – (Your Name)”. Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenge did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Give us one (or more) metric you owned most directly, what it was when you started, and what it was after you left.

4) Tell us one (or more) initiative you took at work that was not requested by your boss, but purely your own call.

5) Your Meta campaign has a CPM of $200, CTR of 2%, ROAS of 1.8. The target ROAS is 3. You have 5 days and a $3,000 remaining budget. Walk me through your thinking, what would you do? If you've faced something similar before, tell me how you solved it.

6) What's the latest skill you self-learned? Why did you upskill on it and how are you using it now? 

7) Attach your resume & portfolio.



We are looking for your thinking process and specific experience. Overly polished or generic answers with no specific numbers/personal details will be disqualified.

title: PHP Developer - Remote Position
description:
You became a technologist because you love solving problems, keeping technology running smoothly, and making sure teams have the tools they need to succeed. You thrive on bringing order to complex systems, troubleshooting issues before they become problems, and ensuring both hardware and software are optimized for peak performance. You’re the person people rely on when things go wrong—and you love

making sure they don’t.



Position Overview

We’re seeking a skilled PHP Developer to join our remote team and support critical business automation projects, custom portal development, and AI-powered tools. This role is essential for advancing our digital transformation initiatives and supporting our distributed workforce.



Key Responsibilities

- Develop and maintain custom WordPress-based intranet portals and business applications

- Build and maintain API integrations with business systems (Salesforce, Google Workspace, QuickBooks, Clockify, Zapier, Expensify)

- Provide internal IT support and troubleshooting for remote employees

- Ensure website security, performance, and uptime

- Design and implement business process automation solutions

- Support AI development projects including chat functionality and automated evaluation tools

- Database management and optimization

- Support internal teams with tech solutions, including automations and integrations of existing tools and platforms

- Participate in daily team huddles and provide regular project updates (15-30 minutes)



Required Technical Skills

- PHP Development: 5+ years experience with modern PHP (7.4+)

- LAMP Stack: Linux, Apache/Nginx, MySQL, PHP

- WordPress: Custom plugin/theme development, REST API integration

- Database Management: MySQL optimization, complex queries, data modeling

- API Development: RESTful services, third-party integrations

- Version Control: Git workflows and collaborative development

- Frontend Integration: JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 for full-stack projects

- Web & Server Security: Deep knowledge of security protocols and troubleshooting technical issues

- Communication Skills: Ability to communicate clearly and confidently with US-based teams, particularly over phone and video calls

- Versatility: Comfort with diverse tasks, from managing support tickets to optimizing databases or troubleshooting server issues



Preferred Experience

- Business System Integration: QuickBooks API, accounting software connections

- Manufacturing/Industrial Software: ERP systems, project management tools

- Process Automation: Workflow automation, data import/export systems

- AI/ML Tools: Experience with AI APIs, chatbot development

- Cloud Platforms: AWS, Google Cloud, or similar hosting environments

- Security: Authentication systems, data protection protocols



Company Culture & Values (PERFORM)

- Performance Under Pressure: We excel under high-pressure situations 24/7, prioritizing respectful communication while delivering the right product at the right place at the right time.

- Eternal Perspective: With an eye to the long-term, we choose the right path over the quick fix, ensuring our actions can always stand up to scrutiny.

- Rigor: We stand out through our meticulous attention to detail, catching what others miss to provide peace of mind to all stakeholders.

- Foresight: We shrewdly share information with external entities, preserving our internal advantages while maintaining absolute honesty in our dealings.

- Ownership: We cultivate a culture of Extreme Ownership, encouraging transparency, honesty, humility, and vulnerability within our team.

- Responsiveness: Always organized and ahead of the curve, we’re prepared to respond swiftly and proactively to needs, always prioritizing communication and fast response times.

- Make Money Together: We uphold a belief in collective success, understanding that when one wins, we all win, and reflect this in our compensation structure.



Work Environment

- 100% Remote Position with flexible scheduling

- Ability to work 09:00-17:00 MDT UTC-6

-A quiet, dedicated home office setup

- Fast-paced environment supporting critical business functions

- Collaborative project work with operations and sales teams

- Daily team huddle participation 

- Single employment expectation (no competing commitments)



We value dedication and focus in our tea
mbers. As a condition of employment, we expect our employees to commit fully to their role with us and not engage in other employment or freelance work. This policy is in place to ensure that our employees are able to perform at their best and contribute fully to the success of our team. If you are currently holding another job or considering additional work, please be aware that we require a commitment to this position as your sole employment.



Compensation & Benefits

- Competitive salary based on experience

- Flexible time off

- Equipment and home office setup support



Ready to join our team? Apply now, it literally takes 6 minutes. No weird questions.

title: SEO EXPERT
description:
SEO Growth Lead (Not a Beginner Role)



We’re looking for a **serious SEO operator** to take full control of our organic growth.



This is not a “write a few blogs” role.

This is **build, scale, dominate rankings, and drive revenue.**



We already have:



* 50+ live blogs

* Multiple domains across different niches

* A foundation in place



Now we need someone who can **turn this into a traffic + lead machine.**



---



## ???? What You’ll Be Responsible For



### 1. Authority Building (Backlinks That Actually Move Rankings)



* Build **high-quality, white-hat backlinks**

* Secure real placements (guest posts, niche edits, partnerships)

* Reverse-engineer competitor backlink profiles

* Run outreach campaigns at scale 
, partnerships, placements)



???? No spam links. No Fiverr junk. Real domains only.



---



### 2. Keyword Expansion (Money Keywords Only)



* Identify **high-intent, revenue-driving keywords**

* Expand existing blogs with **long-tail + semantic keywords**

* Build **topic clusters** across our sites

* Find **low competition, high ROI opportunities**



---



### 3. Blog & On-Page Optimization



* Optimize all existing blogs for:



  * Internal linking

  * Proper structure (H1–H3, readability)

  * Keyword placement & density

* Improve **CTR (titles, meta descriptions)**

* Turn content into **conversion-focused pages**



---



### 4. Technical SEO & Performance



* Ensure all pages are:



  * Properly indexed

  * Fast-loading

  * Structured correctly (schema, crawlability)

* Fix any issues affecting rankings



---



## ???? What We Care About (KPIs)



* Organic traffic growth

* Keyword rankings (especially high-intent terms)

* Referring domains (quality over quantity)

* Leads generated from organic traffic



???? If you don’t think in metrics, this role isn’t for you.





## ? Who This Is NOT For



* Beginners

* “Content writers who do a bit of SEO”

* Anyone relying on outdated tactics

* People who need constant hand-holding



## ? Who This IS For



* Someone who has **actually ranked sites before**

* Someone who understands **how to build authority**

* Someone who can **execute, not just advise**

* Someone who treats this like **their own project**



## ???? Working Setup



* Remote

* Flexible

* Long-term opportunity across multiple projects



## ???? Compensation



* Competitive (based on experience)

* Performance-based upside available





## ?? Read This Before Applying



If you apply, include:



1. 2–3 websites you’ve ranked

2. Keywords you ranked them for

3. How you built backlinks (be specific)



???? If you don’t include this, your application will be ignored.

title: Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant
description:
ABOUT THIS ROLE

We are seeking a highly organized, detail-oriented Bookkeeper / Operations Assistant to join our growing business/financial advisory firm serving clients in e-commerce, consulting and healthcare industries.

You will handle day-to-day bookkeeping tasks, AP/AR, reconciliations, financial documentation, sales/operations support, and basic HR admin.

This is a long-term, stable role with room for growth. 

Accuracy, reliability, and strong communication are essential.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Bookkeeping & Accounting

- Account Payable (invoice processing, bill paying, PO issuance, expense report, payroll)

- Communicate with vendors to request invoices, statements, or credits

- Account Receivable (invoice issuance), bank statement reconciliation

- Support quarter/year-end close: Reconciliations, Verification of transactions

- Support month-end close: Cash Flow Forecast Update, Purchase Order, Inventory tracking

- Prepare financials for audit and tax filing



Administrative & HR Support

- CRM updates (clients, prospects, leads)

- Employee onboarding (collect forms, IDs, signatures, background checks)

- Payroll Management

title: Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript
description:
Developer / Programmer / PHP / MySQL / HTML5 / CSS / JavaScript



About Us

We’re an e-commerce team maintaining several in-house tech projects: Laravel dashboards, TypeScript frontends, Python automations, and Google Apps Script tools. Everything we build supports Amazon listings, ads, and our content pipeline. We work remotely, keep schedules flexible, and focus on practical solutions.



Role Overview

We’re hiring a programmer who can move between different codebases (Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python, Google Apps Script) and keep our tools updated. You’ll partner with teammates across ops and creative to turn real needs into software applications, make straightforward improvements, fix bugs, and document what changed.



Key Responsibilities

- Build and improve features across Laravel/Filament, Next.js/TypeScript, Python scripts, and Apps Script utilities

- Maintain internal tools for Amazon Ads data, reporting dashboards, and creator workflows

- Refactor older PHP modules so they’re easier to maintain and properly documented

- Connect our systems to third-party APIs and keep data flowing correctly

- Communicate with non-technical teammates, gather requirements, and summarize updates

- Keep repos tidy with light tests, basic logging, and good Git hygiene



Skills We’re Looking For

- Fluent written and spoken English; able to explain technical topics plainly

- Hands-on experience with at least two of Laravel/PHP, Node/TypeScript, Python

- Comfortable with SQL and reporting-friendly data models

- Able to juggle multiple projects without losing context

- Organized and diligent about documenting work

- Uses AI coding helpers (e.g., GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, etc.) responsibly



Requirements

- 4+ years of software development experience (or equivalent portfolio)

- Confident using Git, pull requests, and code reviews

- Comfortable with ClickUp, Baserow, or quick to learn similar SaaS tools

- Reliable home workstation with solid internet

- Full-time availability preferred; part-time candidates with consistent schedules considered



Nice-to-Have

- Filament customization or Laravel queue experience

- Background with Amazon Ads or ecommerce analytics

- Google Workspace scripting or Chrome automation

- Eye for clean UI implementation (Tailwind, component libraries, Figma handoff)

- Light DevOps familiarity such as Docker or simple server upkeep



Work Details

- Remote role with flexible scheduling; we care about deliverables and communication, but we don’t run graveyard shifts

- Paid twice monthly via Wise

- Work tracked in ClickUp and shared documentation; you’ll help keep notes current



How to Apply

We use a Google Form to collect applications. If the embedded form isn’t visible, use this link:



We’re looking for steady engineers who enjoy building practical tools and communicating clearly. If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant to the Founder
description:
We are looking for an experienced Virtual Assistant to manage the operational and administrative layer of a fast-growing executive coaching business.



This role requires someone who already has hands-on experience supporting an online business, personal brand, or coaching practice independently. There will be no training on the basics, so you should already understand how to manage client communications, maintain CRM accuracy, draft professional correspondence, and operate tools like GoHighLevel, Skool, Kit, or Stripe without hand-holding.



What you will do



What you will do

 1. Monitor membership expiry dates and send renewal or offboarding messages on time

 2. Chase outstanding testimonials and coordinate video recording sessions with clients

 3. Manage booking links, calendar reschedules, and no-show follow-ups

 4. Onboard new members into Kit with correct tags and sequences activated

 5. Draft routine client and prospect
s for founder review using her voice and tone

 6. Triage the inbox daily and flag only what genuinely requires founder attention

 7. Monitor incoming payments and flag missing or unexpected transactions

 8. Maintain a clean running record of invoices, receipts, and transactions

 9. Review incoming strategy call applications and flag red flags before they reach the founder

 10. Follow up with no-shows, late cancellations, and cold leads using approved sequences

 11. Maintain CRM accuracy and ensure all contacts are correctly tagged and segmented

 12. Manage
 list hygiene in Kit including re-engagement flows and inactive subscriber removal

 13. Reply to YouTube comments and send the right resources to viewers based on their questions



Requirements

Proven experience supporting an online business, coach, or personal brand Strong written English, precise and professional without sounding robotic Hands-on experience with GoHighLevel, Skool, Kit, or Stripe Ability to work independently and take ownership without constant direction Available during European or Gulf business hours Discreet and trustworthy with sensitive client and financial information





Application Questions

Please answer each question with Yes or No, or the specific number or answer requested.



• How many years of experience do you have supporting an online business, coach, or personal brand?

• How many years of hands-on experience do you have using GoHighLevel, specifically building or managing workflows, pipelines, or automations inside it?

• How many years have you managed a client-facing inbox independently, meaning drafting and sending
s without the founder reviewing every single one?

• Which of the following tools have you used professionally and for how long: Skool, Kit, Stripe? List each one with the number of years or months of experience.

• Have you ever been the sole VA for a founder with no team or manager above you, just you and the founder directly? Yes or No. If yes, how long did that arrangement last?

• What is your internet speed and what is your backup plan if your connection goes down?

• Have you ever missed a deadline on a time-sensitive task? What happened and what did you change afterward?

• How many clients or employers are you currently working with and what is your total committed hours per week across all of them? This role starts part-time but grows into full-time. We are not looking for someone already at full capacity.

• What is your hourly / monthly rate? Give a specific number in US dollars. Do not write negotiable without also providing a number. Include your available hours and your earliest start date.





How to Apply

Please do not send a CV.

Instead, reply with your answers to the questions above.

Please change the subject line to: I am the 1% VA

Applications that do not follow this instruction will not be reviewed.

If your answers demonstrate strong practical experience, we will contact you for the next step.

description:

We are a high-end financial media brand producing deep-dive "Financial Reality Checks." Our content focuses on the brutal math behind mortgages, interest rates, compounding fees, and life-trade-off calculators. We utilize a "Vintage Luxury" aesthetic—minimalist, authoritative, and sophisticated.



The Role:

We are looking for a Motion Graphics Architect who can turn dry spreadsheets into cinematic, high-retention documentaries. You will be responsible for building custom animated calculators and data visualizations that help viewers visualize their financial future.

Edit two 20-minute financial documentaries per week.

 marketing, and funnel optimization.

title: Experienced Faceless YouTube Video Editor – Long-Term Role (Passive Home Lab Channel)
description:
We are building Passive Home Lab, a faceless YouTube channel in the sustainable home solutions, off-grid living, and low-tech innovation niche. Our content covers topics like ancient building techniques, DIY home cooling and heating systems, natural energy solutions, and survival-proof home designs — think: "This $100 Solar System Outperforms a $3,000 Panel" or "The 3,000-Year-Old Heating Trick That Cuts Your Bills by 70%."



Our reference channel is Wild Line 
 study their content, pacing, and visual style thoroughly before applying. We aim to match and eventually exceed their production quality.



What We Provide



? Full written script



? Professional voiceover (recorded and ready to use)



All we need from you is the editing.



Your Responsibilities



Edit 10–16 minute videos to a high-retention standard — punchy pacing, strong hooks, no dead air, constant pattern interrupts to keep viewers engaged



Source original, high-quality stock footage and AI-generated visuals relevant to sustainable homes, nature, off-grid builds, and ancient history — zero recycled, reused, or inauthentic content



Use AI tools smartly and responsibly (for visuals, enhancement, B-roll generation) — not lazy AI filler that looks cheap or gets flagged



Add smooth, cinematic transitions and motion graphics that feel dynamic and educational



Include engaging on-screen text, callouts, and lower thirds that reinforce key points



Select and layer royalty-free, non-copyrighted background music that matches the tone (calm, curious, epic where needed)



Maintain a consistent visual identity inspired by Wild Line across all videos



Deliver clean, YouTube-ready exports (1080p or 4K, correct format and specs)



You Are the Right Fit If You:



Have proven experience editing faceless documentary-style or educational YouTube videos



Deeply understand viewer retention mechanics — hooks, pacing, visual variety, and pattern interrupts



Know how to source and use footage legally and originally — no content farm recycling



Are fluent in Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, After Effects, or similar professional tools



Are reliable, proactive, and quality-obsessed — this is a long-term partnership, not a one-off job



Can consistently meet deadlines



Project Details



???? Type: Long-term, ongoing contract



???? Frequency: 3–4 videos/week



?? Average video length: 10–16 minutes



???? Budget: $20 (and we will definitely gonna increase it in the future)



To Apply

Your portfolio — links to faceless YouTube videos you have edited (required, no exceptions)



A brief note on your editing workflow for a faceless documentary-style video



Examples of work closest in style to Wild Line 



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

, Instagram Reels, Stories, and Feed placements

title: Agent Developer
description:
Project Type: Fixed-Price Micro-Project 



Budget: Up to $8 per completed task



Overview

We are looking for automation enthusiasts, developers, and tech content creators to test out and build with our new platform. Your task will be to use our platform to create custom components, nodes, or tools for popular orchestration platforms like n8n, Dify, and others, and then share your experience with the community!



If you love tinkering with AI workflows, low-code automation, and sharing your builds online, this is a quick and easy project for you.



The Tasks & Deliverables



Base Task ($5 Fixed):

- Sign up and use our platform to create a functional component, node, or tool for an orchestration tool (e.g., n8n, Dify, etc.).

- Write a short, authentic post about your experience and the component you built on LinkedIn OR Reddit.

- Crucial Step: Your post must include clear screenshots or proof demonstrating that the component you built actually works and functions successfully within the orchestration tool.



Bonus Task (Additional $3):



- Instead of just a text/image post, record a short screen-share video showing how you used our platform to build the component.

- The video must clearly show the final component working successfully in action.

- Post this video on YouTube OR Reddit.

- (Completing this bonus brings your total payout to $8).



Requirements

- Familiarity with workflow orchestration tools like n8n, Dify, LangChain, or similar automation software.

- An active LinkedIn, Reddit, or YouTube account in good standing.

- Ability to communicate clearly and write authentic, engaging tech content.

- Ability to troubleshoot and successfully test the components you build.

- A basic understanding of APIs and node creation is a plus!



To apply, please reply with:



A brief sentence about your experience with tools like n8n or Dify.

title: High-Level Amazon Operations Manager / Personal Assistant (Supplements Brands)
description:
High-Level Amazon Operations Manager / Personal Assistant (Supplements Brands)



We are launching two new supplement brands on Amazon and are looking for a high-level Operations Manager / Personal Assistant to help build, organize, and manage all aspects of the business from the ground up.



This is not a basic VA role.

We are looking for someone who can think, organize, execute, and take ownership at a very high level.



Key Responsibilities

Operations & System Management

Build and maintain a fully organized dashboard (Notion / Airtable / similar)

Structure and manage all files, documents, and workflows

Track products, suppliers, shipments, and tasks in a clear and scalable system

Ensure everything is documented, up-to-date, and easy to access

SOP Creation & Process Control

Create detailed, step-by-step SOPs for all recurring tasks

Develop checklists and workflows to ensure consistency

Continuously improve processes and eliminate inefficiencies

Ensure all tasks are executed according to defined procedures

Amazon Case Management

Open, manage, and track cases in Seller Central

Handle different case types (FBA, listings, compliance, account issues)

Follow up persistently until resolution

Escalate cases when needed using proper logic

Maintain a structured case tracking system

Supplier Communication

Communicate with suppliers to collect accurate product and compliance information

Request and verify documents (COA, GMP, certifications, product specs, etc.)

Follow up consistently to ensure nothing is missing

Keep all communication organized and documented

Shipment & Inventory Management (Critical)

Create and manage FBA shipments

Handle products with expiration dates — understand shelf life and shipping timing

Decide when inventory should be sent to Amazon

Track shipments end-to-end and ensure accuracy

Account & Brand Support

Assist in managing multiple brands/accounts if needed

Maintain structure and organization across all operations

AI & Efficiency

Use AI tools to improve workflows and productivity

Work with tools like Claude Code and Claude CoWorker to support automation, research, and execution

Help automate repetitive processes and improve speed and accuracy

Research & Problem Solving

Research new processes and solve problems independently

Learn quickly and implement structured solutions

Turn new knowledge into SOPs and repeatable systems

Requirements

Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central (preferred)

Experience working with AI tools (Claude Code, Claude CoWorker, or similar) is required

Highly organized and process-oriented mindset

Ability to manage multiple workflows simultaneously

Strong communication skills (written and verbal)

Ability to learn quickly and work independently

Experience with tools like Notion / Airtable / ClickUp (advantage)

Critical Expectations



This role requires:



Extreme attention to detail

Double-checking every step before execution

Zero tolerance for careless mistakes



You must be someone who does not miss details and takes full responsibility for accuracy.



Important



Before applying, please answer this question:



Do you truly believe you can handle this level of responsibility, precision, and workload — including consistently double-checking your work and avoiding mistakes?



If not, this role is not the right fit.

title: Duda Website & Graphic Designer
description:
We run a small UK-based digital agency building websites for local businesses.  Nothing flashy, just solid, good-looking sites that help people get more enquiries. Most of our clients are trades or service businesses, so the work is pretty practical, but the design still matters a lot.



I’m looking for someone who leans more towards the design side than just building pages.  We care about design, spacing, layout and making sites feel clean and trustworthy. A lot of designers can use Duda, but not all of them can actually make something look right without overdoing it or making it feel clunky.



The way we work is pretty straightforward. I’ll give you the copy, the structure and usually a rough idea of what I’m aiming for. Your job is to turn that into a clean, well put together design in Duda that works properly on mobile and doesn’t feel like a template.



Most projects are a homepage and a couple of inner pages. I’m not expecting anything crazy, but I do need someone who can turn things around at a decent pace. If I send something over, I’d usually expect a first draft within a couple of days so we can keep things moving.



I’m easy to work with, but I do care about deadlines and communication. If something’s going to be late, just say. What doesn’t work is disappearing mid-project.



This is paid per project rather than hourly. A typical job would be a homepage and two inner pages, usually somewhere in the $100-$150 range depending on complexity. Payment is via Wise, and there’s ongoing work here if it’s a good fit.



This probably suits someone who likes doing clean, repeatable work and just getting through projects without overcomplicating things. If you’re more into highly creative, slow-paced design work, it’s probably not the right fit.



If it sounds like something you’d be interested in, send over a couple of sites you’ve designed (ideally in Duda) and a rough idea of how long you’d take to put together a homepage and two pages.

title: Google Ads Media Buyer Who Can Hit Target CPA? We're Hiring
description:
Job Title: Media Buyer (Google Ads) — Work on High-Spend, High-Impact Campaigns

Location: Philippines — Remote 

Salary:  30,000 –  40,000 PHP / month 

Type: Full-time 

Experience: Minimum 1 year in Google Ads or paid media



About AdCeptive Media/

AdCeptive Media is a Dubai-based performance marketing company. We run paid campaigns for global eCommerce and lead generation clients — real budgets, real CPA targets, real accountability. We hire slowly, pay fairly, and give people who execute ownership of their work.



The Role:-

We need a Google Ads Media Buyer who can take a campaign brief and run with it. You will launch, manage, and optimize Search, Display, and Call-Only campaigns for lead generation clients. You will work under direct supervision following our campaign SOPs. You are not expected to independently own a new vertical from day one. You are expected to follow a framework, hit KPI targets, and flag problems before they become expensive.

If you need hand-holding on every decision, are comfortable with vague campaign briefs, or cannot explain why a CPA spiked — this role is not for you.



What You Will Do:-



• Launch and manage Google Ads campaigns across Search, Display, and Call-Only with proper structure and conversion tracking from day one

• Hit CPL and CPA targets — not just manage campaigns, but optimize them down

• Conduct keyword research, write ad copy variants, and run A/B tests on creatives, bids, and landing page hypotheses

• Set up and verify conversion tracking via Google Tag Manager, Google Analytics, and CAPI before any campaign goes live

• Submit weekly performance reports with diagnosis and next actions — not just numbers

• Identify scaling opportunities on accounts hitting targets and flag deterioration on those that aren't

• Collaborate with landing page and creative teams to improve funnel conversion rates

• Join client calls and internal reviews; communicate professionally across time zones





Must-Have Skills:-



• Minimum 1 year managing Google Ads campaigns (lead generation experience preferred)

• Solid understanding of Search campaign structure: match types, bid strategies, Quality Score, ad groups, negative keywords

• Can explain CPL, CPA, ROAS, CTR, and CPC from memory — and knows which metric matters most for which campaign type

• Hands-on experience with Google Tag Manager and Google Analytics for conversion setup

• Has run A/B tests and can explain what was tested, what happened, and why

• Strong written and spoken English

• Can work independently in a remote, async environment across time zones



Nice to Have:-

• YouTube Ads experience

• Pay-per-call campaign exposure

• Experience with call tracking tools (CallRail, WhatConverts, Redtrack,Ringba etc.)

• Basic understanding of landing page optimization and funnel structure





What We Expect in Your First 90 Days:-

Day 1: Complete tool access setup, review one campaign and submit written observations to your manager by end of day, read and sign off on our Google Ads SOP.

First 30 days: Launch at least one campaign with full conversion tracking. Deliver weekly reports with specific optimizations taken. Bring one existing campaign's CPL down by a measurable amount — or write a clear diagnosis of what's blocking it.

First 90 days: Fully own your assigned accounts with minimal check-ins. Hit or beat target CPL/CPA on at least two accounts. Submit one scaling proposal for a high-performing account. Build a testing framework for at least one account.



Our Hiring Process:-

We run a structured process. Missing any requirement at any stage is an automatic rejection — not to be harsh, but because following instructions is the core skill this role demands.



1. Application review — compliance and experience check

2. Structured survey — technical skills, work ethic, self-management (40–45 min, no AI tools)

3. Paid trial task — a real campaign audit with a written plan and a Loom walkthrough

4. Culture interview — 45 min with the Hiring Lead, including a live walkthrough of your trial

5. Founder interview — 30 min, final call and offer discussion

The trial is paid. It takes 4–8 hours of real work. You will receive a simplified version of our Google Ads SOP before you start and your plan must follow it.



HOW TO APPLY:-


 your application to: 

Subject line — exact format, no variation: FirstName-LastName-GoogleAdsMediaBuyer-Philippines (Example: Maria-Santos-GoogleAds MediaBuyer-Philippines)



Your
 must include all of the following — missing any single item = no reply:-



1. CV / résumé as a single PDF:-

2. Google Ads portfolio link or samples (live accounts, case studies, or anonymized screenshots with results)

3. A plain-text two-paragraph answer written directly in the
 body: describe the single best result you have produced in a  Google Ads campaign and exactly how you produced it

4. Your current monthly compensation in USD equivalent and your available start date

5. A photo of your workspace

6. A Speedtest.net screenshot showing minimum 25 Mbps download / 10 Mbps upload

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---



The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---



Why We Need You



We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---



What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---



The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---



We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you

title: Skilled Video Editor for eCommerce VSL Ads & AI Creatives
description:
Hey there,

My team and I are looking for a skilled Video Editor to join our fast-growing eCommerce company.



We are looking for someone who can edit high-converting video ads and 
 for
 and Instagram.



This is not just a basic editing job.



You will be working on performance marketing creatives where the goal is to create videos that grab attention, tell a clear story, and help sell products.



We mainly advertise in Western markets, often to older audiences around 50–70 years old.



Because of this, our video style is usually more story-driven, clear, structured, and persuasive. Not just fast TikTok-style editing.



A big part of the role will be recreating proven video structures and turning scripts, angles, references, and raw materials into strong video ads.



You do not need to be perfect from day one.



But you must be skilled, disciplined, open to feedback, and willing to learn.



---



ROLE



Your main role will be editing VSLs, Mini-VSLs, and direct response video ads for eCommerce products.



These videos will be used for:



-
 ads

- Instagram ads

- Advertorial funnels

- Direct response campaigns

- Product testing campaigns



You will work closely with the CEO and the creative team.



We will give you scripts, references, concepts, angles, and examples. Your job will be to turn them into strong videos that look professional and are built to convert.



---



RESPONSIBILITIES



- Edit VSLs and Mini-VSLs for eCommerce ads

- Recreate proven video structures using new scripts and assets

- Turn scripts into engaging video stories

- Source and structure B-roll clips

- Add captions, subtitles, music, voiceovers, and sound effects

- Improve pacing, emotion, clarity, and flow

- Create multiple variations of ads for testing

- Use AI tools to help generate visuals, scenes, and clips when needed

- Follow feedback and improve each version quickly

- Communicate clearly with the creative team



---



REQUIREMENTS



You MUST:



- Have experience editing video ads, VSLs, or direct response creatives

- Understand how to follow references and recreate proven video styles

- Have strong storytelling and pacing skills

- Be comfortable working with scripts and voiceovers

- Be open to learning new AI tools

- Be able to work independently

- Be reliable and organized

- Have a good laptop or computer setup

- Have fast and stable internet

- Be fluent in English



Experience with these tools is a big plus:



- Premiere Pro

- CapCut

- After Effects

- Canva

- ElevenLabs

- Higgsfield

- NanoBanana Pro

- Veo 3

- Kling

- Sora

- Other AI image or video generation tools



You do not need to know every tool already.



But you must be excited to learn and improve.



---



BIG PLUS



- Experience editing VSLs for ads or funnels

- Experience with eCommerce products

- Experience creating
 or Instagram ads

- Understanding of direct response marketing

- Ability to suggest better hooks, scenes, and creative ideas

- Ability to work fast without losing quality

- Good eye for emotional storytelling



---



RESULTS WE EXPECT



We are looking for someone who can eventually help create:



- 4–6 high-quality VSL / Mini-VSL ads per week

- Strong hooks and story structure

- Clean, professional editing

- Multiple creative variations for testing

- Better quality over time

- Clear communication and reliable delivery



The first 2 weeks will be a paid trial period.



During the trial, we will check your communication, speed, quality, ability to follow instructions, and willingness to improve.



If everything goes well, this can become a long-term full-time position.



---



COMPENSATION



Starting rate: $6/hour



We also offer:



- 2-week paid trial

- Long-term work if the trial goes well

- Performance bonuses for strong winning ads

- Bonuses up to $250 for editing a winning ad

- Pay increases over time based on performance

- Opportunity to grow with the company



We are not just looking for freelancers.



We are building a long-term creative team.



---



IMPORTANT – HOW TO APPLY



When applying, please include:



1. Examples of your best video ads, VSLs, or Mini-VSLs

2. Tell us what editing tools you use

3. Tell us if you have experience with AI image or video tools

4. Tell us if you have experience with
 ads

5. Explain shortly what makes a video ad convert

6. Confirm that you have a reliable laptop/computer and stable internet

7. If you read the full job post, include the word “VSL EDITOR” at the END of your application



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



---



We are looking for someone disciplined, creative, reliable, and hungry to improve.



If you want to grow as a video editor and learn performance marketing creatives, this can become a strong long-term opportunity.



Looking forward to your application.



Kacper Jegier

CEO, KJ ECOMMERCE LIMITED

title: WordPress Landing Page Builder
description:
We are a small UK-based digital marketing agency looking for a skilled WordPress developer/designer to help us build high-converting landing pages for our clients’ PPC campaigns.



Your main responsibility will be turning a client’s existing website (or available online presence) into a focused, conversion-driven landing page for use in Google Ads and Meta campaigns.



A key part of this role is writing landing page copy. You can use AI to assist, but you must first understand the client’s services to ensure the messaging is accurate, relevant, and tailored to their business.



All landing pages are built on WordPress using a block editor theme no coding required. We already have a proven structure and template in place - your job is to gather the most important information from the client’s website, Google Business profile, and social media, then use it to create a high-performing landing page. In some cases, clients won’t have an existing website, so you’ll need to build the page from scratch.



This is a fully remote, project-based role, paid at $10 per hour. A typical landing page takes between 1-5 hours to complete, depending on the industry and whether we already have a suitable template for that niche.



While this is project-based work, we’re looking to build a long-term relationship with someone who can consistently support us with landing pages and other website tasks for our clients.



To apply, please provide the following:

1. A brief explanation of why you’re a strong fit for this role

2. Links to three landing pages you’ve recently built



Successful candidates will be invited to a Google Meet interview. If successful in the interview, you will be asked to build a demo landing page to test your Wordpress and copy writing skills.

title: 3D Car Modeler (Blender) — Grassroots Indie Racing Game
description:
About the Project



Grassroots Legends is an indie simcade racing game in active development, featuring 80s and 90s period vehicles across multiple disciplines (dirt track, rally, rallycross, road, and arena racing). Think beat-up everyday cars from that era, lightly prepped and sent wheel-to-wheel. The vibe is authentic grassroots motorsport, not polished GT cars.



The Role

We're looking for a part-time Blender artist to help optimize existing car models and contribute to the vehicle lineup. You'll be working closely with the creative director on a game that values authenticity. Knowing your Commodores from your Corollas, and basic motorsport understanding is highly valued.



What You'll Be Doing



Optimizing existing vehicle meshes (polygon reduction, LODs, UV cleanup) for game-engine performance

Maintaining visual accuracy on 80s/90s period cars across multiple racing disciplines

Communicating clearly with the creative director through revision rounds (English via discord or whatsapp)



What We're Looking For



Solid Blender skills with a vehicle modeling portfolio — show us real car work

Knowledge of 80s/90s cars valued, familiarity with grassroots/budget motorsport (dirt oval, rally, demo derby, etc.)

Understanding of real-time optimization: LODs, poly budgets, clean topology

Self-directed and reliable: This is a small indie project and we need people who take ownership



Nice to Have

Experience working on racing games or vehicle mods

Interior / cockpit design skills

PBR texturing skills



How to Apply

Send us: 

(1) a portfolio link with your best vehicle work, 

(2) background / interest in motorsport / cars, if any

(3) your expected hourly rate or typical rates per vehicle / optimization.



No portfolio = no consideration.

title: Children’s Book Illustrator (Vintage English Inspired Style)
description:
I’m looking for a talented illustrator to bring an English short children’s chapter book to life through soft, nostalgic illustrations.



The style I’m after is classic vintage English children’s book illustration, inspired by Beatrix Potter and the gentle, detailed world of Sylvanian Families children's toys. Think: soft watercolour tones, warm countryside charm, expressive animals, old English vintage clothes, and a timeless storybook feel.



This is inspired by those aesthetics, not a copy of them, so originality within that world is very important.



Project Details



8 illustrations in total



Includes 1 front cover illustration (full colour)



A mix of full-page story scenes and key narrative illustrations



Focus on animals (rabbits are especially important for this project)



Scenes should feel warm, detailed, and emotionally story-driven rather than cartoon-like



Style Direction



Beatrix Potter-inspired vintage English illustration style



Gentle, natural, watercolour-like finish

Excellent ability to draw animals with expression and character



Experience creating storybook-style scenes with atmosphere and detail



Ability to maintain a consistent style across multiple illustrations



Someone who understands gentle, nostalgic storytelling through imagery



Application

Vintage / classic illustration style pieces



Animal illustrations (particularly rabbits and frogs)



Storytelling-focused artwork or children’s book samples

title: VIDEO EDITOR (REAL ESTATE + AI-ENHANCED CONTENT)
description:
We’re hiring a high-level video editor who knows how to combine real-world footage with AI tools — without making content look artificial.



This is not a basic editing role.

We produce content that needs to feel credible, premium, and grounded, while using AI to elevate — not overpower — the story.



THE ROLE



You’ll be editing short-form video content for a fast-growing, digital-first real estate brand.



Your job is simple:

Turn raw property footage into clean, high-impact videos that build trust and drive attention.



WHAT YOU’LL DO



•?  ?Edit vertical short-form content (Reels, TikTok, Shorts)

•?  ?Work with real footage — phone, drone, walk-throughs

•?  ?Enhance visuals using tools like Nano Banana Pro (or similar)

•?  ?Apply motion, hooks, and transitions using Kling AI (or similar)

•?  ?Maintain a clean, modern, “real-first” editing style

•?  ?Deliver fast, consistent, high-quality outputs



WHAT WE NEED



•?  ?Proven experience in real estate or authority-style content

•?  ?Strong understanding of short-form hooks (first 3 seconds are critical)

•?  ?Ability to enhance footage without over-processing

•?  ?Clean typography, sharp pacing, confident storytelling

•?  ?Hands-on experience with AI video tools



OUR STYLE (READ THIS CAREFULLY)



We are not looking for flashy, over-animated, or “AI-heavy” edits.



Most of the video must stay grounded in real footage.



AI should only be used to:

•?  ?Create strong opening hooks

•?  ?Add smooth, cinematic transitions

•?  ?Enhance location or map visuals

•?  ?Elevate key branding moments



If your portfolio looks like generic AI ads, this is not the right fit.



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



•?  ?Content feels premium and authentic

•?  ?Videos build authority and trust

•?  ?Consistent visual identity across campaigns

•?  ?Fast turnaround with minimal revisions



HOW TO APPLY



Send your portfolio + WhatsApp number below to 

Shortlisted applicants will be contacted directly.

title: Non voice: Social Media & Operations Assistant
description:
Company: Starlight Marketing



Starlight Marketing is looking for a dependable Social Media & Operations Assistant to support both our content workflow and internal operations. This role combines social media execution with basic administrative and coordination tasks to help keep everything organized and running smoothly.



This is a remote position ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, consistent, and comfortable working with both content and backend support tasks.



In this role, you will assist with scheduling and posting social media content, monitoring basic engagement such as comments and messages (non-voice), and helping maintain content calendars and posting schedules. You will also support simple operational tasks such as updating spreadsheets, organizing records, and assisting the team with day-to-day coordination when needed.



We are looking for someone who is organized, reliable, and has good written English communication skills. Familiarity with social media platforms like
, Instagram, or TikTok is important, along with basic knowledge of tools like Google Sheets. Prior experience as a VA or in social media is a plus but not required as long as you are willing to learn and stay consistent.



This is a remote role with a flexible schedule depending on workload. We offer a supportive environment, clear workflows, and long-term growth opportunities for consistent performers.



If you are dependable, proactive, and comfortable handling both social media and operational support tasks, we’d love to hear from you.
