title: ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR
description:
JOB POST FOR THE ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR



At Heritage Career Institute, we are dedicated to advancing healthcare education and preparing the next generation of nursing professionals. Our commitment to academic excellence, innovative teaching methods, and hands-on learning experiences sets the foundation for our students to excel in their nursing careers. 



The ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR for the Practical Nursing Course plays an essential role in delivering structured, high-quality online instruction to PN students. The instructor ensures that students gain the foundational knowledge required for nursing practice while maintaining academic standards and compliance with state and institutional requirements. The instructor will utilize FA Davis, Elsevier, and Populi LMS to deliver lessons, assessments, and student support.



This is a part-time position that requires up to 10 hours per week, depending on the management approval and teaching load. Your permanent Shift will be during the Eastern Standard Time.



Position Summary:



Position:  Online Nursing Instructor

Initial Employment Status: Probationary, Part-Time

Reporting To: Program Director (PN)

Start Date: 1 week after signing the Offer Letter

Work Schedule: Eastern Standard Time (EST) 

Rendering Hours: up to 10 hours per week (depending on the management approval)

Compensation: 175 to 250 pesos per hour (Estimated)



Responsibilities of Online Nursing Instructor

The Online Nursing Instructor for the Practical Nursing Program at Heritage Career Institute plays an essential role in delivering high-quality online education using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi. This role is responsible for teaching PN coursework in a fully virtual environment, facilitating student learning through structured online modules, and ensuring that all instructional content aligns with curriculum and accreditation standards. The Instructor manages online lectures, coursework, assessments, grading timelines, and student academic support while maintaining accurate records within Populi. This includes guiding students through digital resources, monitoring participation, identifying at-risk learners, and providing timely feedback to promote academic success. The Instructor also collaborates with the Program Director to maintain course consistency, improve instructional materials, and support audit and compliance requirements through proper documentation. 



This Job Description will be outlined in detail for you to further understand your role.





ONLINE NURSING INSTRUCTOR

Reports to: Program Director

Collaborates with: Operations, Admissions and Registrar

Primary Focus: Online Delivery of Instruction, Academic Part ONLY

Key Responsibilities:

Online Instruction & Course Management: 

Teach Practical Nursing (PN) subjects through fully online instruction using FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi Facilitate virtual lectures, discussions, and interactive learning activities aligned with PN curriculum standards 

Upload, organize course materials follow institutional and accreditation guidelines

Provide clear, constructive, and timely feedback to support student learning and progression Maintain active online engagement and consistent communication with students throughout the course 

Student Support & Engagement: 

Assist PN students in understanding course concepts and navigating online resources 

Respond promptly to student inquiries via

 Monitor academic progress, attendance, and participation to identify at-risk students 



Compliance & Documentation: 

Maintain complete and updated gradebooks, attendance logs, and academic records in LMS Populi Ensure instructional activities meet state, institutional, and accreditation requirements

 Submit syllabi, lesson plans, and assessment documentation for audits and program review 

Adhere to FERPA guidelines and maintain confidentiality of all student information

Participate in mandatory virtual meetings, orientation sessions, and required training 

Collaboration & Continuous Improvement: 

Coordinate with the Program Director to update teaching materials, curriculum alignment, and lesson plans 

Support curriculum enhancement and assist in integrating improved instructional approaches 

Participate in faculty development, evaluations, and continuing education 

Provide input to improve online teaching delivery, student experience, and overall program quality



Qualifications:

Must be a Registered Nurse (RN) with an active, unencumbered Florida RN license (passed the NCLEX-FL)

Minimum of 2 years clinical experience in nursing

Prior teaching or preceptorship experience is highly preferred

Familiarity with FA Davis, Elsevier, and LMS Populi or similar learning platforms

Strong knowledge of Practical Nursing curriculum and current nursing practices

Excellent communication skills with the ability to teach, and support students in an online setting

Strong technical proficiency in managing virtual classrooms, and navigating digital content

Ability to provide timely feedback, manage deadlines, and maintain accurate academic records

Detail-oriented, and able to work independently in a remote teaching environment

Must demonstrate professionalism, accountability, and adherence to academic standards

Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Google Workspace, and general administrative tools. 

Ability to work with minimal supervision and maintain confidentiality.

Ability to work during AM EST hours without any conflicting schedule 

Must NOT engage in any other employment, consulting, or business activity (whether full-time or part-time) that may create a conflict of interest with the Institution. 

Knowledge about Monday.com or Click-up Application is a plus!



Requirements:

Submit a copy of your resume to 

Please make sure that you have read the Position Summary. 

No counter offers will be accepted.

Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for an interview.

You are required to fill out this application form:

Skills:

title: Remote Highlights Editor (Football)
description:
Overview

Sportway New Zealand works with sports organisations across New Zealand to deliver live match

streaming and digital content.

We are looking for football-focused individuals based in the Philippines to remotely create match

highlights from recorded games. This role plays an important part in delivering engaging video

content to teams, leagues, and fans.



Role Description

Football Highlights Editors are responsible for identifying and clipping key highlights from football

matches while they are being broadcast live or shortly after completion. This work supports

Sportway’s digital content, social media, team, club and fan engagement outputs.

Highlight clipping typically includes identifying moments such as:

• Goals

• Shots on target

• Key saves

• Penalty incidents

• Red and yellow cards

• Other relevant highlights



Editors will be provided with:

• Access to Sportway’s clipping and production platform

• Training on the highlight clipping workflow

• Ongoing support from Sportway’s operations team



Key Requirements

Applicants should meet the following criteria:

• Strong understanding of football

• Ability to accurately recognise and clip key match moments

• Reliable internet connection

• Comfortable working with computer-based platforms

• Good attention to detail

• Ability to work during New Zealand match times



Availability

Most matches take place on Saturdays and Sundays (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season (March – December).

Editors should be available for several hours during match windows when required.



Compensation

Successful Highlights Editors will be paid 800 PHP per match for highlight clipping duties.

Most matches take place on weekends (Philippine time), with match assignments and schedules

communicated in advance. Training on Sportway’s clipping platform will be provided before work

begins.



Location

This is a remote role. Editors can work from home or any suitable location with a stable internet

connection.

Sportway already operates a support and monitoring team based in Cebu who assist with

operations.



About Sportway

Sportway is a sports technology and broadcast company working with numerous sporting

organisations across New Zealand. Our platform provides live match streaming, performance

analysis tools, and digital content for sporting communities.



Expressions of Interest

Individuals who are interested in this opportunity are invited to submit a short Expression of Interest

outlining the following:

• Your background and involvement in football (e.g. player, coach, referee, analyst, content

creator, supporter, etc.)

• A brief summary of your experience with the sport

• Why you believe you would be well suited to the Football Highlights Editor role

• Confirmation of your availability on Weekends (Philippine time) during the New Zealand

football season



Expressions of Interest should be sent via
 to:

Mike Craig, JM Liao




: 

sportway



Shortlisted candidates may be invited to complete a short clipping test and onboarding session

with the Sportway team.

Portfolio (required)

Tools you use

This is an execution-focused role, not a concept design position.



We are looking for someone who can:

title: Virtual Assistant – Data Management & Billing Specialist
description:
Job Title: Virtual Assistant – Data Management & Billing Specialist



Susanne One Love nursing services is seeking a meticulous, tech-savvy Virtual Assistant to join our team. This role is designed for a data enthusiast who can transform complex spreadsheets into streamlined, automated assets. You will be responsible for ensuring our billing is pinpoint accurate and our data workflows are built for future scalability.



Key Responsibilities

    •    Data Entry & Management: Maintain, update, and complete data-driven spreadsheets using Microsoft Excel and Apple Numbers.

    •    Billing Oversight: Process and manage billing cycles, ensuring all figures align with service records and customer accounts.

    •    Cross-Referencing: Perform rigorous audits of data sets to identify discrepancies between booking systems, member logs, and financial records.

    •    Process Automation: Design and implement formulas, macros, or integrated workflows (e.g., Zapier, Excel Power Query) to automate repetitive data tasks and billing triggers.

    •    Reporting: Generate weekly and monthly summaries of billing status and data integrity.



Required Skills & Qualifications

    •    Software Mastery: Advanced proficiency in Excel (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, Conditional Formatting) and Numbers.

    •    Language: Native or bilingual fluency in English (written and verbal) is mandatory for internal communication and audit notes.

    •    Numerical Accuracy: Exceptional attention to detail with a "zero-error" mindset when handling financial data.

    •    Technical Logic: Demonstrated ability to build automations that simplify manual entry and reduce human error.

    •    Independence: Capability to manage time-sensitive billing deadlines with minimal supervision.



Preferred Experience

    •    Previous experience in a wellness, spa, or fitness gym environment.

    •    Experience with billing reconciliation for subscription-based membership models.

    •    Familiarity with cloud-based collaboration tools and project management software.

title: Senior Backend Operations Manager (DTC E-commerce – Shopify)
description:
We are a fast-scaling DTC e-commerce brand and are looking for a **Senior Backend Operations Manager** to take full ownership of our backend operations.



This is NOT a beginner role.

This is NOT a VA role.

This is NOT a marketing role.



We are only looking for someone who has **already operated inside a real DTC Shopify brand** and has been directly responsible for backend operations.



---



THIS ROLE IS 100?CKEND OPERATIONS



This role is NOT focused on marketing, ads, or creatives.



This role is for someone with deep, hands-on experience in:



* Fulfillment operations

* Supplier management

* Order flow & logistics

* Backend systems & processes



If your background is mainly in marketing, ads, or general VA work — this role is NOT for you.



---



HARD REQUIREMENTS (NON-NEGOTIABLE)



Do NOT apply if you do not meet ALL of the following:



* You have worked in a **DTC Shopify e-commerce brand**

* You have been **directly responsible (owned)** backend operations

* You have managed **fulfillment, suppliers, or logistics**

* You have solved real operational problems (delays, supplier issues, shipping errors)

* You understand the full order flow: **purchase ? fulfillment ? delivery**

* You have built or improved **SOPs, workflows, or backend systems**

* You have worked in a business doing **at least $300k/month** (preferably higher)

* You have experience coordinating **teams, agencies, or multiple moving parts**



If you have not owned backend operations — your application will be ignored.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITY



You are not supporting operations — you are owning them.



You will take full ownership over:



* Order fulfillment & tracking flow

* Supplier communication & issue resolution

* Supply chain coordination

* Product listing operations

* Customer support coordination (agency)

* Internal team execution & follow-up

* Building and improving systems (SOPs, workflows, structure)



Your core objective:



Ensure backend operations run smoothly, efficiently, and without chaos — without founder involvement.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



You are:



* Extremely proactive

* A true problem solver (not a task executor)

* Structured in your thinking (systems, processes, flows)

* Comfortable taking full ownership

* Able to operate without micromanagement

* Clear and direct in communication

* Calm under pressure and able to handle complexity



---



THIS ROLE IS NOT FOR YOU IF



* You need step-by-step instructions

* You only execute tasks without thinking

* You have only done VA or customer support work

* You don’t have real DTC e-commerce experience

* You avoid responsibility or ownership

* You wait instead of taking action



---



BIG PLUS



* Experience scaling DTC brands

* Experience with Shopify Flow / automation

* Experience with tools like ClickUp, Notion, Slack

* Basic financial understanding (COGS, margins, fulfillment costs)

* Experience improving operational efficiency at scale



---



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE



* Orders are fulfilled on time consistently

* Suppliers are managed proactively and efficiently

* Problems are solved before they escalate

* Systems are built, documented, and followed

* Tea
mbers execute without constant follow-up

* The founder is fully removed from daily backend operations



---



APPLICATION (MANDATORY)



We are only reviewing serious candidates.



To apply, you MUST answer:



1. What DTC Shopify brand(s) have you worked for? Include revenue level.

2. What backend operations were you directly responsible for?

3. Describe a real operational problem you solved and exactly how you fixed it.

4. Walk us through the fulfillment flow in your previous company.

5. What would you do in your first 30 days in this role?



Applications without these answers will be ignored.



---



We are looking for a long-term operator who wants ownership, responsibility, and growth inside a fast-scaling company.



If you are that person — apply.

title: Full-Cycle Remote Sales Closer — Must Close Deals, Not Book Calls
description:
We are hiring a real full-cycle sales closer for a remote U.S.-market B2B role.



This is a U.S.-market sales role focused on selling services to U.S.-based local service businesses, so you must be comfortable speaking with American business owners and selling into the U.S. market.



This is not an appointment setter position.

This is not a lead generator position.

This is not a VA or customer support role.



We are specifically looking for someone who can take a prospect from outreach and first conversation all the way to a closed deal.



You must be comfortable owning the sales process, including:



* building a prospect list from scratch

* contacting and qualifying prospects

* running sales conversations

* handling objections

* following up until decision

* and closing deals



If your background is appointment setting, lead generation, customer support, admin, or booking meetings for someone else to close, this role is not the right fit.



What you will do



* build and manage your own prospect list based on our targeting direction

* contact potential clients

* qualify real opportunities

* run sales conversations

* handle objections confidently

* follow up consistently

* move qualified prospects toward decision

* close deals

* keep the pipeline and notes updated properly

* submit accurate handoff information once a deal is closed



Who we want



* real B2B sales closing experience

* strong spoken and written English

* confidence on calls

* ability to control a conversation without sounding pushy or desperate

* ability to understand a service offer and sell it clearly

* organized, reliable, and results-driven

* experience closing service-based offers is required



Do not apply if your background is



* appointment setting

* lead generation

* customer support

* admin / VA work

* booking meetings for someone else to close



We are looking for someone who has been directly responsible for closed business, not someone who only created activity before the close.



Compensation



* paid trial first

* then base + commission for the right closer

* exact structure discussed with shortlisted candidates based on actual fit and closing ability



When applying, briefly answer



Note: Please answer all application questions clearly and completely. Incomplete or vague answers will be treated negatively.



1. What sales deals have you personally closed, and were they mainly B2B or B2C?

2. Did you personally run the sales call from conversation to close?

3. What kind of service-based offers have you closed before?

4. Do you have experience selling to U.S.-based businesses or working in the U.S. market? If yes, explain briefly.

5. What is the difference between an appointment setter and a closer?

6. Are you comfortable being judged by real sales conversations and closed results?

title: CONTENT & DISTRIBUTION MANAGER (SOCIAL MEDIA)
description:
CONTENT & DISTRIBUTION MANAGER (SOCIAL MEDIA)



We’re a fast-growing agency working with online creators and personal brands.



We’re looking for someone who understands short-form content and wants to grow fast with us.



ROLE

- Post daily across Instagram accounts

- Repurpose content (turn 1 clip into 3–4 variations)

- Manage and grow multiple social media accounts

- Maintain consistent, high-quality posting (non-spammy)

- Track what performs and improve weekly



CONTENT REPURPOSING (IMPORTANT)

You will turn 1x clip into multiple unique versions by adjusting:

- Hook (first 1–2 seconds)

- Cropping / zoom

- Text overlays

- Captions & positioning



Each version must feel unique in IG’s eyes while still using the same base content.



ORGANISATION & CONSISTENCY

- Keep content structured and organised (folders, tracking, planning)

- Track top-performing posts weekly

- Plan ahead to ensure daily posting consistency



If a model is not producing new content, you must:

- Repurpose existing content properly (not lazy reposting)

- Space out and rotate content intelligently

- Maintain quality and avoid obvious repetition



WHAT WE WANT

- Strong understanding of Reels / TikTok-style content

- Good eye for viral hooks

- Knows how to repurpose content properly

- Organised and consistent

- Can think independently (not just follow instructions)

- Willing to learn and improve



PAY

- $700–$800/month (starting)

- Performance bonuses available

- Fast growth opportunities for top performers

---

IMPORTANT

For this role, you’ll need a dedicated iPhone used only for work (to target US/UK audience properly).



BONUS

If you understand how to target US/UK audiences, mention it in your application.



HOW TO APPLY

Send:

- Short intro

- Any relevant experience or examples



ADDITIONAL (REQUIRED FOR SHORTLISTING)



Please include:



1. Your current device/setup

(iPhone model, laptop, editing apps you use) and also please confirm you have a spare iPhone that can be used for this job and setup with a US/UK Apple ID which we will provide 



2. Your experience with short-form content

(Accounts you’ve worked on or types of content)



3. US/UK targeting knowledge

Briefly explain:

- How you would set up an account to target US/UK

- What actions you’d take to ensure the audience is correct



4. Content understanding

Explain in your own words:

What makes a short-form video perform well in the first 1–3 seconds?



Shortlisted applicants will receive a test task before hiring.

title: Experienced Appointment Setter (B2B Cold Caller) - $150 Commission
description:
* PLEASE READ THE ENTIRE DESCRIPTION BEFORE APPLYING *



Hey, I am JT! I am looking for 1-2 hard working appointment setters for my small business. I'm not a big call center where you are just a number. I'm a small business owner and looking for help doing outbound B2B cold calling for me.



I help small businesses with an A.I. Receptionist to answer their missed calls and after-hours calls. This is a simple, in-demand offer. I just need help introducing it and getting business owners interested.



YOUR ROLE:

-- Source your own leads, leads are not provided.

-- Call 60-80 new contacts per 4-hour shift.

-- Offer them a free consultation to learn about A.I.

-- If they show interest, schedule them for a consultation with me

-- That's it! Once they show-up to their appointment, I take over.



REQUIREMENTS (DO NOT APPLY UNLESS YOU MEET ALL THE CRITERIA):

-- Experienced B2B Cold Calling and Appointment Setting. This means 100% cold calling — no prior contact, no warm leads.

-- If you have only worked inbound leads, warm leads, or marketing leads, DO NOT APPLY.

-- Clear and confident English communication with no heavy accent.

-- You are someone who is money hungry and motivated to hit your targets.

-- You are reliable with consistent attendance.



HOURS:

-- Part time (20 hours) to start, with the option for full time after 30 days.

-- Monday - Friday 10AM-2PM Pacific Standard Time (Tuesday - Saturday 1AM-5AM Philippine Time).



PAYMENT:

-- $4/hour base

-- $20 each qualified appointment that shows up

-- $150 each person who signs up for our services

-- Monthly bonuses



HOW TO APPLY:

-- Do not mention previous jobs that are not specifically related to cold calling B2B.

-- Put "Dial And Smile" as your subject line

-- Copy and paste the following questions and put answers in your application. Please use your own words, and do not use chat GPT or similar:



1) How many months/years of experience do you have specifically cold calling business to business and appointment setting (ONLY put jobs that were entirely cold leads....no warm leads, no inbound calls, etc):



2) What product/service were you offering and to who (please be detailed with this response and clear what you were offering):



3) How many calls per day did you average:



4) How many appointments per week did you average:



5) Did you source your own leads or were you given leads:



6) Do you currently have another job:



7) You call a business and a receptionist answers. They ask, “What is this regarding?”

What do you say to get through to the owner?

(Keep your answer to 1–2 sentences max and write it exactly how you would say it on a real call):



8) What makes you better than other cold callers applying for this role:

title: Short Form Video Editor
description:
THIS IS NOT A BASIC EDITING JOB.

We run two pet content brands — Chic Kitty (cats, 42,
 Group members) and Shaggy Chic (dogs, 9,200 members) — across
 and Instagram. We produce character-driven short-form content built around real animals with distinct personalities. Hugo is chaos. Selina is editorial luxury. Every video is 8–15 seconds. Either every hook lands in the first 1.5–3 seconds, or the video fails.

This is an ongoing monthly role, not gig work. Every deliverable comes with a recipe card, character guide, and approved content bank. You are not inventing — you are executing a precise system. Familiarity with our brands and system will make every month faster than the last.

WHAT YOU PRODUCE EACH MONTH

CHIC KITTY (cats):

— 30 short-form videos (8–15 seconds, 9:16 vertical, Reels-ready)

— 10 carousels (5–7 slides, 1:1 and 4:5 formats)

— 5–8 Story video clips with thumbnails

— Thumbnails for every Reel and carousel (1280×720px, JPG)

Footage source: Raw footage delivered via Google Drive from our Thursday film sessions.

SHAGGY CHIC (dogs):

— 30 short-form videos (8–15 seconds, 9:16 vertical, Reels-ready)

— 10 carousels (5–7 slides, 1:1 and 4:5 formats)

— 5–8 Story video clips with thumbnails

— Thumbnails for every Reel and carousel (1280×720px, JPG)

Footage source: You source commercially licensed HD dog footage. Storyblocks is the required platform — an active Storyblocks subscription is a condition of this role. Sourcing guidelines and approved search criteria provided on Day 1.

TOTAL MONTHLY OUTPUT: 60 Reels + 20 carousels + 10–16 Story clips + all thumbnails.

TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS

HOOK

Cold open. No intro. No logo. No fade. The most arresting frame is frame one. You have a maximum of 1.5–3 seconds. If the hook does not stop the scroll, the video has failed regardless of what follows.

AUDIO — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Trending Instagram audio is the baseline. You research trending sounds weekly — 30 minutes minimum, cross-referencing Instagram Reels and CapCut trending audio. If a sound is climbing across multiple high-performing pet videos, that is your priority pick. ASMR audio layering is required on specified videos. No elevator music. No generic royalty-free filler. No old lady tracks. No sounds with zero 
ntum on the platform. Music is a critical component of this role — editors who fall short here are not the right fit.

COLOR AND AESTHETIC

Cool and vibrant. Editorial and modern. Never warm. Never golden hour. Never domestic amber tones. Clean whites, cool-toned neutrals, saturated natural color. Warm grading is an automatic fail. If your portfolio skews warm — this is not the right aesthetic fit.

PACING

Every cut is intentional. Audio and visual cuts sync on the beat or a sound cue. ASMR elements are layered with precision — immersive, not jarring, not buried. 8–15 seconds is a precision instrument.

EXPORT

CapCut Pro is mandatory for final export on every video so Instagram-licensed audio embeds natively. You may rough cut in any NLE. No TikTok watermarks. No unlicensed audio. No third-party branding on any final file.

CAPTIONS

Auto-captions corrected manually on every video. Font, size, and placement follow the recipe card. Captions never cover the subject's face or key visual element.

CAROUSELS

Layout design only using the brand template provided. All text comes from the approved content bank — you are not writing copy. Deliver finished frames as individual PNGs and a combined export to Google Drive.

DELIVERY

48-hour turnaround on every batch. Hard requirement, not a target. Files delivered to Google Drive with correct naming convention. Nothing delivered with watermarks or incorrect format.

WEEKLY TREND REPORT

Every Monday: 3-bullet note to the OBM. What audio is trending this week. What performed well in the pet niche. One recommendation for the coming week's content. Five minutes to write.

WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

— Portfolio including pet or animal content with strong retention, character-driven short-form under 20 seconds, ASMR-style edits, and carousel design

— CapCut Pro expert level — audio library, auto-caption tool, keyframe system, and export settings completely fluent

— Active Storyblocks subscription or willingness to obtain one before start date

— Understands hook mechanics, pattern interrupts, audio sync, and visual contrast technically — not vaguely

— 48-hour delivery discipline. Every time.

— Clear written communication. One message with full context, not multiple pings.

TEST TASK

We will send you a raw footage clip of a Minskin cat and a carousel brief.

Deliverable 1: An 8–12 second Reel. Hook in first 2 seconds. ASMR audio layer under a trending track. Clean corrected captions. No watermarks. Delivered as MP4 via Google Drive link.

Deliverable 2: A 5-slide carousel using stills we provide. Brand palette and approved copy included — layout only.

Turnaround: 48 hours from receipt of footage.

title: Web Developer / Support Engineer
description:
## About the Role



We're looking for a dedicated, full-time Web Developer and Support Engineer to join our team on a long-term basis. You'll build, maintain, and support our WordPress websites and platforms — from crafting custom theme functionality to managing the cloud infrastructure that keeps everything running. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys both writing code and solving problems, and who's comfortable switching between development work and hands-on customer support. You don't need to know everything on day one — we provide paid training and have senior technicians on hand to help you grow into the role.



## Position Details



- **Type:** Full-time, long-term position

- **Hours:** Australian business hours (AEST/AEDT)

- **Salary:** ~$1,500 USD/month

- **Location:** Remote — must be available to work during Australian business hours

- **Requirements:** Willingness to sign a Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) and Non-Compete Agreement

- **Leave:** Australian public holidays off, plus leave over Easter and Christmas/New Year periods

- **Training:** Paid training provided to get you up to speed where there are knowledge gaps

- **Support:** You'll be backed by senior technicians who are available to guide, mentor, and support you



## Responsibilities



- Develop and maintain WordPress sites, including custom theme modifications, plugin configuration, and performance optimisation.

- Build and manage page layouts and content structures using Elementor and Advanced Custom Fields (ACF).

- Configure and support LearnDash-powered learning environments, including course setup, user management, and troubleshooting.

- Write custom PHP functions to extend WordPress themes and plugin behaviour as needed.

- Manage and monitor hosting infrastructure on Amazon EC2, including instance configuration and scaling.

- Configure and maintain Amazon Elastic Load Balancers to ensure high availability and reliable traffic distribution.

- Respond to support requests, diagnose issues, and implement fixes across the web stack.

- Communicate directly with clients via phone and
 — explaining technical issues clearly, providing updates, and guiding customers through solutions.

- Document technical processes, configurations, and solutions for the team's knowledge base.



## Required Skills & Experience



- **Exceptional written and spoken English** — you will be communicating directly with Australian clients via phone and
, so clear, professional, and confident English is essential.

- Solid working knowledge of **PHP** in the context of WordPress development.

- Experience building and customising sites with **WordPress**, including theme and plugin development.

- Proficiency with **Elementor** page builder for layout creation and management, using Hello Elementor as a theme base.

- Hands-on experience writing custom functions for **WordPress theme modifications** (functions.php, child themes, hooks, and filters).

- Familiarity with **Advanced Custom Fields (ACF)** for building flexible content structures.

- Experience with **Amazon EC2** instance management and **Elastic Load Balancing**.

- Comfortable performing **basic Linux troubleshooting** via the command line (SSH, log files, file permissions, service management).

- Willingness to receive and make phone calls to assist customers directly.

- Willingness to sign an NDA and Non-Compete Agreement.



## Nice to Have



- Experience with **Cloudflare** — particularly security configuration, DNS management, and Cloudflare Stream.

- Experience with **LearnDash** LMS configuration, course building, and user management.

- Familiarity with other AWS services (RDS, S3, CloudFront, Route 53).

- Understanding of web security best practices (SSL, firewalls, WordPress hardening).

- Familiarity with caching strategies (object caching, CDN configuration, page caching plugins).

- Experience with site migration and DNS management.



## What We Value



- A problem-solving mindset — you're resourceful and enjoy figuring things out.

- Clear, confident communication — you're comfortable picking up the phone and talking a client through an issue.

- A willingness to learn new tools and technologies as the role evolves.

- Ownership and reliability — you follow through and keep things running smoothly.

- Long-term commitment — we're looking to build a lasting working relationship, not fill a short-term gap.

title: Lead Generation Virtual Assistant
description:
We're a Google Ads agency working with DTC ecommerce brands on Shopify, helping founders scale beyond Meta and unlock profitable growth through paid search and shopping. We're growing our outbound engine and need someone obsessive about clean data and quality leads.



What you'll do

You'll be the engine behind our outbound pipeline — finding the right founders, building qualified lists, and helping us land in their inbox or DMs with a relevant first line.



Day-to-day:

Source and verify
 leads of DTC ecommerce founders/decision-makers (target: £2–5M revenue Shopify brands)

Build Instagram lead lists — identifying founders active on IG, capturing handles, profile context, and recent post themes

Write custom personalised first lines for cold
 and Instagram DM outreach, based on each prospect's brand, recent activity, or business signals

Maintain clean lead sheets — no duplicates, verified
s, enriched with the fields we need

Flag disqualified leads (wrong vertical, too small, too big, dropshipper red flags, etc.)

Hit weekly volume targets without sacrificing quality



Must-have experience

Proven lead gen experience for B2B agencies or SaaS — ideally targeting ecommerce or DTC

Hands-on with Apollo, Instantly, and/or Smartlead for sourcing and
 verification

Comfortable with Clay, Apify, or similar scraping/enrichment tools

Manual sourcing skills via LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Instagram

Strong written English — your first lines need to sound human, specific, and not AI-generic

Detail-obsessed: clean spreadsheets, consistent formatting, no broken data



Nice to have

Familiarity with the Shopify ecosystem (knowing what a "good" DTC brand looks like at a glance)

Experience writing cold
 copy or outreach personalisation at scale

title: Short-Form Editor & Designer
description:
About Breaklabs

Breaklabs is a growing sports card breaking channel on Whatnot running live rips of NBA, NFL, MLB, and Pokémon products. We're obsessed with running clean, hype-driven shows — great camera work, fair break formats, and real relationships with our regulars. We're looking for a video editor with strong graphic design chops who lives and breathes the hobby to help us turn Breaklabs into a destination channel.



The Role

You'll own the visual side of everything that happens outside the live show — the cuts, clips, and graphics that get people to click "Join Show" and remember the channel. This is a hands-on creator role, not a render-and-deliver job. If you can't talk comfortably about PSA pop reports, Bowman 1sts, Prizm color tiers, or National Treasures RPAs, you'll miss the moments worth clipping.



What You'll Do

Cut show footage into short-form content (pulls, reactions, funny moments, customer hits) and get it posted within hours of the break, not days — for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts

Edit longer recap content for YouTube — top 5 pulls of the week, show highlights, breaker reactions

Design graphics and break announcements in Canva or Figma — show schedules, featured product drops, giveaway posts, winner callouts, channel art, thumbnail templates

Build a consistent visual identity across thumbnails, overlays, and graphics so Breaklabs looks like Breaklabs from the first frame

Create motion graphics, lower thirds, and on-screen elements for live shows when needed (countdown timers, hit alerts, sponsor bumpers)

Maintain a tight clip library and naming convention so nothing gets lost

Coordinate with the on-camera team on what's worth clipping, what graphics are needed for upcoming shows, and turnaround priorities

Iterate on what's working — track which clips and thumbnails drive the most Whatnot follows and show attendance, then make more of that



What You Bring

Deep familiarity with the sports card hobby — you know the products, the rip culture, and the personalities. Whatnot watching history is a big plus

Strong video editing chops in CapCut, Premiere, or DaVinci — fast turnaround matters more than cinematic polish (send us a reel)

Graphic design ability in Canva or Figma — show us your work

A good eye for pull moments worth clipping and short-form hooks that stop the scroll

Experience designing thumbnails that earn the click (not just the impression)

Self-directed — you'll get direction, not hand-holding



Nice to Have

After Effects experience for motion graphics

Experience editing for another breaker, card shop, or sports content channel

Sound design instincts — knowing when to lean into hype audio vs. let a pull breathe

Your own collection (show it off in your application)

title: Military Content Scriptwriter & Footage Researcher - Short Form & Long Form Video
description:
US focused military content page with 2.4 million followers on
. We publish short form video reels daily and are expanding into long form documentary content covering military operations, weapons systems, equipment, and history. All footage is sourced from public domain military archives. We need a dedicated scriptwriter and footage researcher to own the quality and retention of everything we produce.



Footage Sourcing



Search public domain military archives daily for the strongest video candidates across short form and long form formats

Assess each candidate for hook potential, visual variety, and story arc before recommending it

Deliver footage links to the editor with a one-line brief explaining the strongest angle and why it will perform

Stay ahead of the content calendar — footage must be identified the evening before production begins

Build a running library of strong footage organised by category — vehicles, aviation, naval, special operations, interdictions, historical



Short Form Scriptwriting



Write three to five short form VO scripts per day for reels between thirty and sixty seconds

Apply a structured story framework to every script without exception — strong hook, open loop, midway hook at fifteen to twenty seconds, and a payoff that rewards patience

Format all scripts for ElevenLabs AI voiceover — two to three words per line, numbers as words, specific safe language substitutions applied throughout

Deliver finished scripts with hook identified, midway hook timecoded, payoff marked, stat card suggestions included, and ElevenLabs pacing notes for the voice artist



Long Form Scriptwriting



Write 4-5 long form documentary scripts per week between three and ten minutes in length

Structure each script around a full narrative arc — origin, conflict, escalation, resolution, legacy

Layer facts and human stakes together — long form content must feel like a documentary, not a Wikipedia article read aloud

Identify the strongest retention spikes within the long form structure and engineer deliberate hooks at the two minute, four minute, and six minute marks to prevent drop-off

Deliver long form scripts with full timecode guidance, section headers for the editor, and music energy notes throughout



Editor Collaboration



Work directly with the editor daily via Slack — scripts and footage delivered together so he has everything he needs without chasing

Review rough cuts and flag any VO timing mismatches before final export

Suggest stat card text, music energy notes, and visual pacing guidance alongside every script

Be available during editing hours to answer questions and turn around quick revisions fast



Retention Ownership



Track retention performance on every published piece of content

Identify which hook formulas, story spines, and VO styles are driving the highest watch time

Bring weekly retention data into your scripting decisions — what worked last week should inform what you write this week

Flag underperforming content patterns and propose structural fixes

About Us

Our commitment is to deliver high-quality products that enhance respiratory health and overall quality of life for our customers.



We’re looking for a Viral UGC Clips Creator & Video Editor who knows how to turn raw footage into high-retention, scroll-stopping clips for social media and can also create high-quality, realistic AI-generated ad videos.



This role is not about basic editing — it’s about understanding virality, hooks, pacing, storytelling, and leveraging AI tools to produce compelling ad creatives.



We’re Looking For



A creative who:

Understands what makes short-form videos go viral

Can identify strong hooks, moments, and emotional beats from raw footage

Knows how to edit for retention, watch time, and replays

Is familiar with trends, formats, and platform-native styles

Can create realistic AI ad videos (UGC-style, avatars, voiceovers, etc.)

Can consistently produce multiple high-quality clips per week

Understands internet culture, short-form psychology, and AI-driven content creation.



What You’ll Do

Raw testimonial videos

Product demos

Creator footage

Existing long-form content



Create AI-generated ad creatives, including:

Realistic AI UGC-style videos

AI avatars or voiceovers

AI-enhanced storytelling and visuals



Add:

Strong opening hooks (first 1–3 seconds matter most)

On-screen captions optimized for retention

Fast pacing, jump cuts, zooms, and pattern interrupts

Repurpose clips across social media platforms

Study what’s already working and iterate fast



You Bring



Proven experience editing short-form videos that drive:

High watch time

Strong engagement

Shares or saves

Experience creating high-quality, realistic AI ad videos

A strong sense of:

Hook writing

Story flow

Visual rhythm

Familiarity with tools like:

CapCut, Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar

AI tools (e.g., Heygen, Runway, Higgsfield, ElevenLabs, or similar)

Ability to follow brand guidelines while keeping content native and authentic

Comfort working quickly and iterating based on feedback



To Apply



Please include:

Examples of short-form clips you’ve edited (Meta Ads/Reels/Shorts links)

A brief explanation of why you think those clips performed well

Examples of AI-generated ad videos you’ve created



Additionally, please record and send a short Loom video answering the following questions (APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM WILL NOT BE CONSIDERED):

Which AI tools have you used to create ad creatives, and how do you ensure they look realistic and engaging?

Can you walk us through a piece of AI video content you created that performed well and explain why it worked?



Please include the color of the sky in your reply so we know you’ve read the post carefully.



We look forward to hearing from you.

title: Technical Operations Specialist (GHL & Digital Assets)
description:
Systems-Focused GHL Specialist for Boutique Marketing Agency



About the Role:

We are a specialized growth agency looking for a self-reliant, tech-forward GHL Specialist to serve as our technical partner. We are currently in a "Strategic Build" phase and are seeking a long-term collaborator to architect, document, and refine our proprietary systems as we move toward full-scale operations.



The Partnership Path:

- Phase 1 (Trial/Build): Project-based work to establish core "Elite" workflows, high-logic pipelines, and landing page templates.

- Phase 2 (Growth): Regular weekly touch-base meetings as we onboard initial clients and monitor system health. *Part Time

- Phase 3 (Scale): Ongoing technical management, data analysis, and system optimization. *Possibility to add hours or shift to Full Time



Key Responsibilities:

- GHL Architecture: Build, audit, and manage sub-account Snapshots, including nested if/else workflows, complex pipelines, and multi-step custom forms.

- Web & Landing Pages: Build high-converting landing pages and agency sites directly within the GHL funnel builder.

- Technical Logistics: Manage A2P 10DLC registrations, domain integrations, and administrative access protocols.

- Fulfillment Support: Assist with Google Business Profile (GBP) management and technical administrative setups.

- Reporting & Data Analysis: Weekly extraction of KPIs from GHL and PPC dashboards. You will prepare data summaries (lead volume, tier-ranking, and cost-per-lead) to assist the founder in client reporting.

- The System Log: Maintain a detailed, client-by-client technical log (SOP) documenting every automation, tagging logic, and pipeline structure. You must be able to explain the logic behind every build.

- System Optimization: Proactively suggest GHL features or third-party integrations (Zapier, etc.) that could improve client ROI.



Bonus Skills:

- Experience or familiarity with white-label Google Ads management or major white-label PPC providers.



Who You Are:

- Tech-Forward: You stay updated on the latest GHL BETA releases and use modern integrations.

- Self-Reliant: You take ownership of a task from start to finish and solve problems proactively.

- Articulate: You can explain complex logic clearly and concisely in plain English.

- Positive & Professional: You enjoy building systems from the ground up and value long-term partnership.



To Apply:

Please provide a brief video (Loom, Zoom, or similar) or a detailed screen-share presentation showing:

1. A complex GHL workflow or landing page you have built (specifically showing if/else logic).

2. An example of how you document your technical work/SOPs for a founder or client.

3. Your favorite tech integration or GHL feature that most people overlook.

4. A bit about you and why we should work together!

MINDSET REQUIREMENTS

• You want long-term, possibly lifetime, stability - not job hopping every few years

mbers who want stability and consistency

title: Video Editor - Real Estate
description:
To apply, complete the Google Form linked in this posting.


/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc9Pdpe2Jc-GA76eNNDos9S9EDL2B9-zAf_n7R9nafiRn3MKw/viewform?usp=dialog



Applications submitted directly through OnlineJobs.ph will not be reviewed.



ABOUT ALLISON MEDIA CO.



Allison Media Co. is a premium real estate media company serving high-performing agents and developers across Ontario — from Niagara to Toronto. We produce photo, video, aerial, and marketing content that helps properties sell and brands stand out.



We're growing fast. Volume is up. Our standard is high. And we need editors who can keep up.



WHY THIS ROLE EXISTS



This isn't a filler role. We have real estate shoots happening daily and a growing backlog of video content that needs to be edited to a premium standard — fast.



The edit is where the brand lives. Every video we deliver goes to an agent's listing, a developer's launch, or a brand's social presence. Your work directly impacts how our clients are perceived and how our business grows.



We need someone who can jump in, learn the standard quickly, and start cutting clips that are clean, consistent, and on-brand — immediately.



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



This is a high-volume, high-standard editing role. You'll be responsible for:



Editing 3–5 real estate video packages per day

Working primarily in Premiere Pro and DaVinci Resolve

Following AMC's editing style, pacing, and color guidelines

Catching your own errors before files are submitted for review

Organizing and managing your own project files cleanly

Communicating clearly with the lead editor and owner on status and flags

Improving your output quality continuously based on feedback



HOW YOU WIN HERE



You'll know you're succeeding when:



Your edits are consistently clean and require minimal revisions

You're hitting turnaround targets without sacrificing quality

The team trusts your files without needing to double-check everything

Your output is improving week over week

Clients are proud to post what we deliver



REQUIREMENTS



Non-negotiable:



Real estate video editing experience — you must have a portfolio that proves it

Proficiency in Premiere Pro and/or DaVinci Resolve

Strong understanding of pacing, color, and storytelling for property video

Ability to work full-time immediately upon hiring

Reliable internet, computer, and professional editing setup

Strong written English for team communication

Editors without real estate experience

OUR CORE VALUES



These are operating requirements — not wall art.



Extreme Ownership

HOW TO APPLY

title: Architectural Visualizer (Part-Time, Long-Term) — SketchUp + Enscape — U.S. Real Estate
description:
I'm a U.S.-based commercial and residential real estate broker (Dallas, expanding to NY and LA). I underwrite multifamily and commercial deals where ADU additions and interior unit renovations create the value-add story. I need ONE skilled architectural visualizer for these renderings on a per-project basis, ongoing, on-call. This is a long-term, part-time role.



WHAT YOU'LL PRODUCE PER DEAL

- Massing + site plan showing ADU additions on existing parcels

- Floor plans for proposed ADUs (typical 400–1,200 sf, 1–2 BR)

- Exterior renders (2–4 angles) — photoreal, contextual, no stock people

- Interior renovation renders — kitchens, baths, living spaces with new finish palettes (LVP, quartz, fixtures, paint)

- Source files: .skp + render project files



WHAT MAKES THIS EASY FOR YOU

You do NOT need to know U.S. zoning. Every deal comes with a one-page brief:

- Property address, parcel APN, Google Earth screenshot

- All zoning constraints pre-translated: setbacks, max height, lot coverage, FAR, parking — exact numbers

- Scope checklist: ADU / interior / both

- Aesthetic references — Pinterest board plus 3–5 image links per deal

- Deliverables list and deadline



REQUIRED SKILLS

- SketchUp Pro — fast, clean modeling

- Enscape, D5, Lumion, or Twinmotion — photoreal output

- Photoshop — touch-up, sky replacement, contextual collage

- Interior design sensibility — you can build a finish palette from a reference image, not just model what I tell you

- AutoCAD or Revit basics for cleaner floor plans (preferred)

- Strong written English



AESTHETIC DIRECTION

Calm, restrained, editorial. Reference the energy of The Local Project, AD, Listed Nest LA. Warm natural light, real materials, no oversaturated marketing-render look. No people unless requested. Output should belong in a high-end OM, not a SketchUp tutorial.



ENGAGEMENT

- Part-time, long-term position (not project-by-project)

- $600–$800/month base, paid weekly via Wise

- ~20 hours/week, 2-hour daily overlap with U.S. Central Time

- Bonus: $50 per OM-feature render published, plus closing bonus on funded deals

- 13th month pay after 12 months. Paid Philippine holidays.



PAID TEST

$75 flat for a real-deal test: site plan, 2 ADU exterior renders, 1 interior renovation render. Best output wins the ongoing relationship.



WHEN APPLYING, INCLUDE

1. Portfolio link — show real estate / multifamily / residential, not corporate

2. 3 favorite past projects with brief context

3. Your software stack and typical turnaround

4. Confirm the aesthetic direction matches your sensibility

5. Use the word "palette" in your application so I know you read this



Skip generic "expert in 3D rendering" applications — they'll be auto-rejected.

title: Newsletter Copywriter
description:
The Opportunity

Winnipeg Digest is a fast-growing, Winnipeg-only newsletter and Instagram brand that helps locals discover what's happening around the city. We reach over 150,000 people across
 and social, and we send 3 newsletters per week to 52,000+ subscribers with very high engagement.



We're looking for a Managing Editor who loves details, deadlines, and local stories. Someone who takes full ownership of the newsletter from start to finish and uses AI tools to work faster and smarter. Your work will land in tens of thousands of inboxes three times a week and help local businesses grow.



This is not a "content strategist" or "big ideas" role. This is an operator role. You own the product. You ship it. You make sure every date, link, and location is correct before it goes out. If that sounds like you, keep reading.



What You'll Do:

Newsletter Ownership (Core)

• Own all 3 weekly
 newsletters end-to-end: research, curation, writing, formatting, QA, and scheduling.

• Aggregate local events, news, openings, and things to do in Winnipeg from multiple sources.

• Write in a warm, friendly, "local neighbour" voice. No hype. No press release language. Just useful local info.

• Run a final accuracy check on every issue: dates, links, locations, names, and sponsor details must be correct every single time.



Sponsor Integration

• Draft and place sponsor ads within newsletters so they feel like trusted recommendations, not billboards.

• Send sponsor ad drafts for approval and manage one round of revisions.

• Prepare simple monthly sponsor performance reports (opens, clicks, highlights).



AI Tools & Systems

• Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, or similar) to speed up research, drafting, and fact-checking.

• Build and improve internal workflows using tools like Claude's Cowork or Claude Code to make the newsletter process faster and more reliable over time.

• When you apply, please include the word "forks" somewhere in your form response so we know you read the full posting.

• Document processes and checklists so the system gets stronger every week.



Team Coordination

• Work with our content assistant on Instagram assets and simple research tasks tied to each newsletter.

• Keep the founder informed with short async updates (Loom or written).



Who You Are

• You have owned a newsletter, publication, editorial calendar, or content product before. You know what it means to ship on a deadline with zero errors.

• Your written English is excellent. You can match a warm, conversational, community-first tone and make it sound natural.

• You are detail-obsessed. Wrong dates, broken links, and missed events bother you more than they bother most people.

• You are comfortable working with AI tools and genuinely curious about building better prompts, workflows, and automations. Experience with Claude Code, Claude Cowork, or building AI agents is a strong plus.

• You are reliable. You show up on time, meet deadlines, and communicate early if anything changes.

• You are happy being the person who ships, not just the person with ideas.



Logistics

• Schedule: Sunday through Thursday. Sunday is non-negotiable (the Monday newsletter is built on Sunday).

• Core hours: 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM Central Time (Winnipeg).

• Commitment: Full-time, 40 hours per week.

• Location: Remote.



How to Apply

Fill out the application form here: 



You will be asked to submit a short Loom video (1-2 minutes) telling us why you're a good fit for this role.

title: AI Operations Manager | Peptide Telehealth & Aesthetic Consulting Agency
description:
**JOB TITLE:** Elite Virtual Assistant — AI Operations Manager | Peptide Telehealth & Aesthetic Consulting Agency





**LOCATION:** Remote | US-Based Company | Michigan



---



**TO APPLY: Your first line must say "Operator Ready" — any application without this exact phrase is automatically deleted. No exceptions.**



---



## About Us



We are building two simultaneously growing businesses in the peptide telehealth and AI consulting space. Our first business is a peptide telehealth network and licensed provider platform connecting compounding pharmacies with medical spas across the United States. Our second business is an AI consulting agency serving medical spa owners — we build AI chatbots, booking automation, content systems, and growth infrastructure for aesthetic practices.



We are targeting $1M in revenue within 12 months across three revenue engines — telehealth subscriptions, medspa network memberships, and peptide distribution margins.



This is a ground floor opportunity. You will not be answering
s and scheduling meetings. You will be building a company alongside the founder and thinking like an owner every single day.



---



## Who We Are NOT Looking For



- Someone who needs to be told what to do every hour

- Someone who treats this like a part time side gig

- Someone who has never used AI tools professionally

- Someone who needs a script for every situation

- Someone who has never worked in healthcare or wellness



---



## Who We ARE Looking For



We need an operator. Someone who reads a goal and figures out how to get there. Someone who sees a problem before the founder does and solves it before being asked. Someone who thinks in systems, builds processes, and uses AI to multiply their output by 10x.



You must have hands-on experience with Claude AI specifically. Not just ChatGPT. We use Claude for content creation, business strategy, outreach writing, SOPs, and client communication. If you have never used Claude you will not succeed in this role.



You must think like a business owner — not an employee. Every task you complete should move us closer to revenue.



---



## Your Core Responsibilities



**AI Operations (Daily):**

- Use Claude AI to draft outreach
s, SOPs, content, client proposals, and scripts

- Use ChatGPT, 
, and Zapier to build automations that eliminate repetitive tasks

- Use GoHighLevel or HubSpot to manage all CRM pipelines

- Use HeyGen or Pictory to create AI-powered video content for Instagram

- Use Notion to build and maintain the company operating system

- Research and implement new AI tools that improve speed and output

- Report weekly on what was automated and how much time was saved



**Business Setup and Operations (Week 1–2):**

- Verify Michigan LLC status and organize all legal documents

- Set up complete Google Workspace including Gmail, Drive, and shared folders

- Build HubSpot CRM with pipelines for pharmacy partners, medspa leads, and telehealth patients

- Research and build a list of 50 medspas across Michigan and surrounding states with owner name,
, phone, and Instagram handle

- Research licensed 503B compounding pharmacies and compile provider account application requirements

- Build complete Notion operating system with SOPs, task trackers, contact databases, and weekly dashboards



**Pharmacy and Medspa Outreach (Week 2–4):**

- Send 10 personalized cold outreach
s daily to medspa owners using Claude-written templates

- Send 10 Instagram DMs daily to medspa owners using approved scripts

- Follow up with every lead on a structured schedule — day 3, day 7, day 14

- Track every conversation in HubSpot with notes, next steps, and follow-up dates

- Book discovery calls directly onto the founder's calendar using Calendly

- Apply for provider accounts at all target pharmacies



**AI Consulting Operations (Week 2 Ongoing):**

- Build AI chatbot demos using Voiceflow or Manychat for medspa prospects

- Research and document AI tools relevant to medspa operations

- Create client onboarding systems including welcome
s, shared folders, and 30-day deliverable timelines

- Build service menu one-pagers and proposal decks in Canva

- Develop and maintain a content library of approved scripts, captions, and
 templates



**Telehealth Platform Support (Week 2 Ongoing):**

- Research HIPAA-compliant telehealth platforms and compile feature and pricing comparisons

- Support patient intake process setup

- Build patient onboarding
 sequences in GoHighLevel

- Track FDA regulatory updates on peptide reclassification

- Compile compliance resources including COA requirements and state-specific telehealth regulations



**Instagram and Content Operations (Daily):**

- Post one piece of content daily across both business accounts

- Write all captions using Claude AI in approved brand voice

- Use CapCut or HeyGen to create or edit video content

- Respond to all comments within 1 hour

- Send 10 DMs per day to targeted medspa owners

- Track follower growth, engagement rate, and DM response rate weekly

- Report content performance every Friday



---



## Tools You Must Know Before Applying



**Non-negotiable:**

- Claude AI

- ChatGPT

- Google Workspace

- Canva

- Notion

- HubSpot or GoHighLevel

- Calendly

- Instagram content posting and DM outreach

- CapCut



**Strong bonus:**

- 
 or Zapier

- HeyGen or Pictory

- Voiceflow or Manychat

- Any telehealth platform experience

- GoHighLevel full platform experience



---



## Your 30-Day Performance Targets



| Week | Target |

|------|--------|

| **Week 1** | LLC verified, CRM built, 50 medspa leads compiled, pharmacy research complete, Notion OS live |

| **Week 2** | Outreach started, 100
s sent, 5 pharmacy applications submitted, Instagram posting daily, first calls booked |

| **Week 3** | 3 discovery calls completed, AI chatbot demo built, telehealth platform comparison delivered |

| **Week 4** | First medspa network member signed OR first telehealth patient onboarded, full operating system running independently |



---



## Compensation and Growth Path



**Starting:** $400–$500/month — 20 hours per week



**Day 31 — if targets are hit:**

- Promoted to full time Operations Manager

- 40 hours per week

- Salary increase to $800–$1,200/month

- Bonus structure tied to revenue milestones

- Equity conversation at $500K revenue



This is not a job. This is a career. If you help build this company you will be rewarded like someone who helped build it.



---



## How to Apply



 [your
 address] with the subject line: **"Operator Ready — [Your Name]"**



Your application must include:



1. The phrase **"Operator Ready"** as your very first line

2. A 5-sentence paragraph on why you are the right operator — be specific not generic

3. Your resume showing relevant experience

4. A list of every AI tool you have used with one sentence on how you used each one

5. Your answer to this question: *"We need to sign our first 5 medspa clients in 30 days. Walk me through exactly what you would do in week 1."*

6. Your available hours, time zone, and earliest start date



**Applications missing any of the above will not receive a response.**



---



## Paid Trial Test — Top 3 Finalists Only ($30 paid)



**Task 1 — AI Operations (1 hour)**

Use Claude AI to write a 3
 cold outreach sequence targeting medspa owners. Initial outreach, day 3 follow up, and day 7 follow up. Each
 under 150 words with a clear call to action.



**Task 2 — Research and CRM (1 hour)**

Find 10 medspas in Michigan with owner name,
, Instagram handle, and phone number. Enter all into HubSpot with a pipeline called "Medspa Outreach" with these stages: New Lead ? Contacted ? Call Scheduled ? Proposal Sent ? Closed Won.



**Task 3 — Notion Operating System (45 min)**

Build a Notion workspace with these sections: Pharmacy Partners, Medspa Pipeline, Telehealth Patients, Content Calendar, Weekly Tasks, and SOPs. Populate each with sample content.



**Task 4 — AI Video (15 min)**

Use HeyGen, Canva, or CapCut to create one 30-second video script and either record it or show the finished edit. Topic: "Why your medspa needs peptide therapy in 2026."



---



## Interview Questions for Finalists



1. "You wake up Monday and I am unreachable for 48 hours. You have 10 medspa leads waiting for follow up, 3 pharmacy applications to submit, and Instagram hasn't been posted in 2 days. Walk me through exactly what you do."

2. "How have you personally used Claude AI in a past role? Give me a specific example with results."

3. "What is one automation you would build in week 1 using 
 or Zapier to save us time?"

4. "We need to sign our first medspa client in 14 days. What is your plan?"

5. "What do you know about the peptide telehealth industry and FDA regulatory changes in 2026?"



---



## Instant Disqualification



- Missing the "Operator Ready" phrase

- Generic application that could apply to any job

- Cannot name specific AI tools used

- Takes more than 12 hours to respond during hiring

- Cannot complete the trial task independently



---



We are building something real in a multi-billion dollar industry that is about to explode after a major FDA ruling in July 2026. The person who gets this role will look back in 12 months and say this was the best career decision they ever made.



If that is you — apply now.

title: Video Editor — Talking-Head YouTube (Long-Form) + Instagram Reels (Short-Form)
description:
What we make

We teach the hardest topics in nursing school — cardiac, ABGs, electrolytes, prioritization, NCLEX strategy. Our voice is real-talk, not toxic-positivity ("the test is hard, you're not stupid, here's the trick that actually works"). Think NurseInTheMaking energy, but sharper edits and tighter hooks. We're scaling content fast. YouTube long-form is launching now (Video 1 in post). Instagram reels are running on a "trainbloom" mid-thought open / line-per-breath teleprompter format with on-screen text directions baked in.



What you'll do

Long-form YouTube (1–2 per week)

8–15 minute talking-head videos, mostly studio footage from a Sony ZV-E10 II (4K 30p, S-Cinetone)

Trim filler, tighten pacing, layer B-roll (we provide a B-roll pack), add on-screen text emphasis, lower thirds, chapter markers

Build a pattern interrupt every 15–20 seconds (cuts, zooms, graphics, sound design)

Captions burned in + uploaded SRT



Short-form Instagram Reels (3–5 per week)

30–60 second cutdowns from long-form OR standalone teleprompter reels

Trainbloom-style edit: hard mid-thought open, no intro, every line snaps, on-screen text reinforces every beat

Hook on screen by frame 2, payoff by second 25, no lazy CTA

Vertical 9:16, captions, native-feeling pacing (we don't want it to look "edited" — we want it to look inevitable)





You're a fit if

You've edited 50+ talking-head videos for a creator/coach/educator in the last 12 months

You have a portfolio with at least 3 long-form YouTube edits AND 3 reels you cut yourself (links, not screenshots)

You're fluent in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve for long-form, and CapCut or Premiere for shorts

After Effects skill is a plus (we use animated text emphasis + simple kinetic typography)

You actually watch educational creators on YouTube and IG — you can name 3 nursing/medical/test-prep creators whose edits you respect and tell me what they do well

You can turn around a long-form edit in 3–5 days and a reel in 24–48 hours

You communicate in writing fast and clearly (
/async-first)



You're NOT a fit if

You need hand-holding on creative direction every step

Your portfolio is mostly wedding videos, brand commercials, or motion graphics reels (different muscle)

You "do everything" — I'd rather hire someone obsessed with talking-head educational content specifically

You ghost for 4 days on a revision



Deliverables per month:  4 long-form videos | 15–20 short-form videos



Compensation:  $1k across 4 months / $250-$300 a month

title: Virtual assistant phone caller, send emails
description:
# NOW HIRING: Virtual Assistant / Phone Caller

**Malibu Slimm Films LLC — AI Video Production & Special Effects**



**Position Type:** Permanent Part-Time | Remote

**Pay:** $1.65 per hour to start + Performance-Based Pay Increases + Commission Bonuses

**Hours:** 4 Hours Per Day | 5–6 Days Per Week

**Start Date:** Immediate



---



## About the Company



Malibu Slimm Films LLC is a California-based AI video production company specializing in cinematic-quality special effects, scene generation, and AI-generated video content. We serve production companies, digital studios, music video directors, advertising agencies, and streaming platforms nationwide — delivering studio-level visual results at independent film budgets.



We are fiscally sponsored by From the Heart Foundation and are actively expanding our vendor partnerships across the country.



**Website:** 

*
:** 

**Phone:**
## About the Role — Two Campaign Structure



This position supports two active sales campaigns that run on a full monthly rotation. You will spend one entire month (four weeks straight) focused exclusively on Campaign 1, then the following entire month (four weeks straight) focused exclusively on Campaign 2. Campaigns alternate month to month until further notice. Depending on how well a campaign performs, we may choose to remain on it for an additional month — this will be determined and communicated to you in advance. If any other change or switch is needed at any point, you will be informed ahead of time. All scripts, contact lists,
 templates, and links for both campaigns will be provided to you in advance.



---



### ???? CAMPAIGN 1 — AI Special Effects & Video Production

**One Full Month (4 Weeks Straight)**



You will be reaching out to video production companies, post-production studios, music video companies, digital agencies, and entertainment studios nationwide to introduce Malibu Slimm Films' AI-generated special effects and video production services.



---



### ???? CAMPAIGN 2 — AI Virtual Real Estate Staging

**One Full Month (4 Weeks Straight)**



You will be reaching out to real estate agents, brokers, and real estate agencies nationwide to introduce Malibu Slimm Films' AI virtual staging services — digitally transforming empty or outdated property photos and videos into fully staged, photorealistic listings that help agents sell homes faster.



---



**Important:** All contact lists, phone scripts,
 templates, portfolio links, and campaign materials for both campaigns will be fully provided by the company. You will never need to research your own leads or create your own content for either campaign. You simply follow the system provided.



We are looking for a motivated, professional, and personable Virtual Assistant/Phone Caller to represent Malibu Slimm Films LLC across two active outreach campaigns targeting video production companies and real estate professionals nationwide.



You will be calling on behalf of our Founder, Jonathan Slack, to introduce our services, build relationships with decision-makers, and generate leads. You will alternate between campaigns every two weeks — full details, scripts, and contact lists for both are provided.



This is not a high-pressure sales job. This is relationship-building and introduction work. You will be given full phone scripts, call trackers, pre-researched contact lists,
 templates, and all necessary links — everything you need to succeed from day one with zero guesswork.



---



## What You Will Do



- Make a minimum of 20 outbound calls per day to production companies and studios using the provided contact list — all contact names, phone numbers, and

- Introduce Malibu Slimm Films' AI video production and special effects services to Heads of Production, Executive Producers, and Line Producers

- Leave compelling voi
s when contacts are unavailable

- Send a follow-up
 within 5 minutes of every call — all
 templates, portfolio links, demo reel links, and company materials will be provided to you; you will simply insert the contact's name and send

- Send outbound introduction
s to the contact list in addition to phone calls — all
 addresses and
 content including links will be provided by the company

- Log every call and every
 sent in the provided tracker (date, contact name, phone or
, result, follow-up date)

- Flag hot leads immediately so the founder can personally follow up

- Submit a daily activity report at the end of each shift covering total calls made, total
s sent, voi
s left, and leads generated



?? **Please be advised:** All phone calls and
s sent on behalf of Malibu Slimm Films LLC will be monitored and reviewed for quality assurance. By accepting this position you agree to this condition.



---



## What You Will Be Selling (On Our Behalf)



You will be introducing the following services:



- **AI-Generated Special Effects & VFX** — photorealistic effects and cinematic visuals

- **AI Scene & Video Generation** — full scene creation and environment builds

- **Virtual Set & Environment Design** — digital production-ready locations

- **Post-Production Enhancement** — AI-assisted color, audio, and effects finishing

- **Commercial & Branded AI Video** — short-form content for campaigns and platforms



**Our tools include:** KLING 3.0, SEEDANCE, Higgsfield, Wan 2.6, and Nano Banana Pro



**Our value proposition:** Studio-quality output at independent budgets — delivered in days, not weeks.



---



## You Will Be Calling These Types of Companies



- Post-production and VFX studios

- Music video production companies

- Independent film production companies

- Digital and branded content studios

- Advertising and marketing agencies

- Corporate video production companies

- Streaming platform vendor departments



You will be provided with a pre-built list of production companies nationwide — including verified direct phone numbers,
s, and contact notes — organized by region and category. You will never need to find your own leads.



---



## What We're Looking For



**Required:**

- Clear, confident, and professional phone presence

- Fluent in English (spoken and written)

- Comfortable making cold calls and talking to business professionals

- Able to follow a script naturally without sounding robotic

- Strong organizational skills — you must log every call accurately

- Reliable internet connection and a quiet workspace

- Basic
 proficiency (Gmail or similar)

- Self-motivated and consistent — you set your own pace within daily minimums



**Preferred (Not Required):**

- Familiarity with the film, video production, or entertainment industry

- Experience with CRM tools or call log spreadsheets

- Bilingual a plus



---



## What We Provide You



? Complete phone script — no guessing, no improvising required

? Pre-built contact list of companies with verified phone numbers and
s

? Follow-up
 template ready to copy and send

? Call log tracker — simple spreadsheet format

? Ongoing support and feedback



---



## Compensation & Job Security



- **Hourly Rate:** $1.65 per hour starting rate

- **Hours:** 4 hours per day, 5–6 days per week

- **Weekly Earnings:** Approximately $33–$39.60 per week guaranteed

- **Commission Bonus:** Additional pay for every lead that converts into a signed contract

- **Performance-Based Pay Increases:** Your hourly rate will increase based on your performance, consistency, and results — the better you perform, the more you earn

- **This is a Permanent Position:** This is not a short-term gig. You are being hired for a stable, ongoing remote role that will run every month for the next 12 months minimum

- **Job Stability:** As long as you meet expectations, your position is secure for the full 12-month period — this is consistent, reliable work you can count on month after month

- **Payment Method:** To be discussed at time of offer (PayPal, Wise, Zelle, or direct deposit)



We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term. If you show up consistently, follow the system, and deliver results — your pay will reflect that. This is a permanent role with real opportunity for growth.



---



## Daily Expectations

 blasts as assigned |
