title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---



The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---



Why We Need You



We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---



What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer. Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---



The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---



We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---



Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---



Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---



Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---



Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---



How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status





Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---



Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi



We look forward to meeting you Monday

title: Virtual Sales Quoting Assistant
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and detail-oriented Virtual Sales Quoting Assistant to support our health insurance sales team. In this role, you will intake data from multiple sources, consolidate it into a cohesive format, and generate accurate plan quotes based on client-specific intake forms. You will collaborate closely with licensed agents, ensuring all quoting materials meet client needs and compliance standards.



This is a remote role requiring strong proficiency in Excel, excellent data handling skills, and the ability to take direction and feedback in a fast-paced, client-driven environment.



Key Responsibilities:

Data Intake & Consolidation:

- Gather and review client information from multiple files, forms, and formats.

- Consolidate all inputs into a single, organized quote file to support agent presentations.

- Cross-reference and align data according to client eligibility and plan requirements.



Plan Matching & Quoting:

- Interpret client intake forms to determine appropriate health insurance plans based on factors such as age, location, budget, and coverage needs.

- Select plans from approved carriers and create clear, accurate quote documentation.



Excel & Data Entry:

- Use advanced Excel features (e.g., formulas, VLOOKUP, pivot tables, conditional formatting) to manage and manipulate data efficiently.

- Accurately enter and format data within predefined templates or quoting tools.



Agent Support & Communication:

- Collaborate with sales agents to clarify client needs, request missing data, and ensure quotes are timely and aligned with expectations.

- Take feedback from agents and make adjustments promptly and accurately.



Compliance & Quality Control:

- Ensure all quotes follow regulatory guidelines and company protocols.

- Review quote files for accuracy, consistency, and completeness before submission.



Qualifications:

- 2+ years of experience in sales support, quoting, or data processing in the health insurance industry (or similar regulated field).

- Advanced Excel proficiency with strong data management and organization skills.

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in data entry and file management.

- Strong written and verbal communication skills.

- Ability to work independently in a virtual environment with minimal supervision.

- Experience interacting with licensed health insurance agents or brokers is a plus.



Preferred Skills:

- Familiarity with health insurance carriers, plans (ACA, Medicare, etc.), and quoting practices.

- Experience with quoting tools, CRMs, or enrollment platforms (e.g., HealthSherpa, Quote+, Salesforce).

- Understanding of HIPAA guidelines and data handling best practices.

### About the Role



We are seeking an experienced **USDT OTC Manager** to lead our over-the-counter stablecoin trading desk. You will serve as the primary point of contact for high-volume clients, institutional counterparties, and liquidity providers — ensuring smooth, compliant, and competitive USDT transactions at scale. This is a high-trust, high-impact role for someone who understands both the technical and relationship-driven sides of OTC crypto markets.



---



### Key Responsibilities



- Execute and manage large-volume USDT OTC transactions for institutional and high-net-worth clients

- Source and maintain liquidity from counterparties, market makers, and exchange partners

- Build and grow a pipeline of OTC clients through networking, referrals, and proactive outreach

- Negotiate competitive rates and structure deals aligned with risk and profit targets

- Monitor market conditions, track spot price spreads, and manage settlement risk in real time

- Coordinate with compliance and AML teams to ensure all transactions meet regulatory requirements

- Maintain accurate records of trades, P&L, and client activity

- Onboard new clients, oversee KYC/KYB verification, and manage ongoing relationships

- Develop and refine OTC desk SOPs, pricing models, and risk management frameworks



---



### Requirements



- 3+ years of experience in crypto OTC trading, digital asset brokerage, or a similar financial markets role

- Strong understanding of USDT, stablecoin mechanics, and on-chain/off-chain settlement processes

- Existing network of OTC counterparties, institutional clients, or liquidity providers is a strong advantage

- Familiarity with AML, KYC, and compliance requirements in crypto financial services

- Proficiency with trading platforms, OTC portals, and blockchain explorers

- Excellent negotiation, communication, and client relationship management skills

- High integrity, discretion, and ability to handle sensitive financial information

- Ability to work across time zones and respond to client needs in a timely manner



---



### Nice to Have



- Experience with multi-chain USDT settlement (TRC-20, ERC-20, Solana)

- Background in FX, commodities, or traditional finance OTC markets

- Familiarity with custody solutions, cold wallet management, or exchange API integrations

- Multilingual skills (Mandarin, Arabic, or other languages a plus for client coverage)



---



### Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive base salary (commensurate with experience)

- Performance-based commission tied to trading volume

- Remote-friendly, flexible working arrangements

- Salary payable in fiat or crypto

You will work closely with leadership to turn direction into:

This role is not just execution — it requires strong thinking, organization, and attention to detail.



?



Responsibilities



Creative Concepts & AI Prompting

    * ad concepts

    * hooks

    * captions

    * campaign angles

    * content variations

* Translate ideas into clear, actionable creative directions

* Build concept banks for ongoing campaigns

?



Design & Template Creation

    * ad layouts

    * product callout frames

    * hook cards

    * end cards

    * CTA graphics

    * UGC overlay templates

* Prepare production-ready files for use in both static and video content



?



Product & Campaign Creative

* Create variations of ads and creative for testing

* Support seasonal campaigns and product launches

* Organize assets by product, color, and campaign



?



Blog & Structured Content Support

* Support updates to blog structure and layout

* Help implement and maintain JSON-LD / schema markup (training provided if needed)

?



Organization & Workflow



* Maintain organized folders for all creative assets

* Build and maintain a creative tracker by campaign and product

* Prepare clear handoff files and instructions for the video editor

* Keep workflows efficient and repeatable



?



Brand Focus



This role supports an established apparel brand focused on:



* performance basics

* product education and benefits

* seasonal campaigns and promotions



?



Requirements



* Strong Canva experience (required)

?



Bonus Skills

*
 marketing (Klaviyo) experience



?



Weekly Deliverables

* Product-focused visual assets

* Blog overlays or structured content updates

* Organized creative files ready for use

* Clear handoff materials for video editing

What Shopify Google Ads accounts have you managed?

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About The Dream Out Loud Group/Morgan Nelson 



Dream Out Loud is a fast-growing coaching, events, and mastermind business on a mission to help ambitious entrepreneurs build businesses that fund the life they actually want. We run premium programs, live events (including DreamFest, our flagship annual event), and high-touch masterminds for founders who want to scale without burning out.



We move fast, hold a very high bar, and invest heavily in people who want to grow with us. Our audience is entrepreneurs, high performers, and business owners who respond to bold, aspirational, beautifully designed content.



Our Values are: 

1) Impact First

Tagline: "We measure success by lives changed, not tasks completed."

? We do: measure success by client wins, focus on what truly moves the needle, design everything for transformation.

? We don’t: chase vanity metrics, tick tasks for the sake of looking busy, or confuse activity with impact.



2) World Class Standard

Tagline: “Stretch Beyond Average”

? We do: deliver excellence quickly, refine until it’s remarkable, and hold ourselves accountable to elite standards.

? We don’t: settle for “good enough,” let sloppiness slide, or accept mediocrity.



3) The Pursuit Of Mastery

Tagline: “Always a student, never finished.”

? We do: Are always growing as individuals professionally and personally. We learn, test, stretch, and practice until we’re world-class; we assume v1 is wrong and improve it.

? We don’t: protect ego, repeat yesterday’s version of ourselves, or resist feedback.



4) Own the Outcome

Tagline: “No excuses. No blame. Just results.”

? We do: take full responsibility, communicate clearly, and bring solutions not problems.

? We don’t: pass the buck, drop the ball, or hide behind excuses.



5) Truth with Respect & Integrity

Tagline: “Say it straight, say it kind & Leave it behind”

? We do: speak openly, honestly, and respectfully; give direct feedback and close loops fast then move on with the mission.

? We don’t: gossip, sugarcoat, avoid tough conversations, or let issues fester.



6) Good Humans, Great Energy

Tagline: “Bring the vibe, lift the tribe.”

? We do: treat people with respect, bring positive energy, celebrate wins, and keep work joyful and purposeful.

? We don’t: bring negativity, drama, or ego; we don’t let “fun” turn into chaos.



---



The Role



This is not a "post and pray" social media role. We are hiring a **growth-obsessed Social Media Manager** who lives on the platforms, knows what's working before it's mainstream, and treats follower count, watch time, and conversion like a scoreboard.



Your #1 priority, every single day, is making our social channels grow. Accounts being the personal brand of the founder (Morgan Nelson) the podcast IG channel aswell as our upcoming event IG page. 



That means staying ahead of trends, feeding the team a constant pipeline of ideas, working hand in hand with our Creative Director to ship content that pops, and making sure every post goes live on time, on platform, and on brand.



You will own the rhythm of our social presence across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts,
. If our social is flat, that's on you. If our social is on fire, that's also on you.



---



## What You'll Actually Do (In Order of Priority)



**1. Trend Research & Idea Generation**

- Spend dedicated daily time studying what's trending across IG, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and X

- Track competitor and adjacent founder/coaching brands (Hormozi, Brunson, Codie Sanchez, etc.) and report what's working

- Maintain a live trend board: sounds, formats, hooks, edits, visual styles

- Bring 5+ fresh content ideas to every weekly content meeting, mapped to our offers and audience

- Identify trending audio and formats early so we ride the wave, not catch the tail end



**2. Working With the Creative Director**

- Partner closely with our Creative Director on shoots, edits, and creative direction

- Translate trend insights into clear, actionable briefs the Creative Director and editors can execute

- Give sharp creative feedback on cuts, hooks, captions, thumbnails, and covers

- Flag what's missing in the content pipeline before it becomes a problem



**3. Creation, Scheduling & Publishing**

- Own the full content calendar across Instagram, TikTok, YouTube Shorts.

- Create carousels and simple video edit reels in the IG app.

- Schedule and publish all posts on time, with platform-native formatting (no lazy cross-posting)

- Write captions, hooks, hashtags, and on-screen text optimised for each platform

- Manage stories, reels, lives, and any time-sensitive content windows

- Keep a clean, organised content library so nothing gets lost



**4. Growth & Performance**

- Track follower growth, reach, watch time, saves, shares, and conversion every week

- Run small experiments constantly (hook variations, thumbnail tests, posting times)

- Report weekly on what worked, what didn't, and what we're doing about it

- Engage with comments, DMs, and the community to build real audience connection

- Spot opportunities to repurpose winning content across platforms



**5. All Things Social Growth**

- Stay across platform algorithm changes, new features, and beta tools the day they drop

- Test new formats early (lives, broadcast channels, threads, new video lengths)

- Build relationships with creators, accounts, and communities aligned with our audience

- Help shape the social-first content strategy as the brand scales



---



## Non-Negotiables (You Must Have All of These)



- **3+ years of social media management experience** for a brand, founder, or business that actually invested in growth (not personal accounts only)

- **Proven track record of growing accounts.** You can show us numbers: follower growth, watch time, saves, shares, viral posts, and explain how you got there

- **You live on the platforms.** You scroll IG and TikTok daily, not as a chore but because you genuinely love it

- **Sharp eye for trends.** You can spot a sound or format before it peaks and know how to adapt it to a brand voice

- **Strong written English** and the ability to write captions, hooks, and on-screen copy that sound human, punchy, and on-brand

- **Tight execution.** You schedule, publish, and double-check. Nothing slips. Nothing posts late.

- **Designer experience** You know your way around canva very well and can create eye stopping but also simple carousel images and basic design work when needed.

- **You take direction well** and collaborate cleanly with a Creative Director without ego

- **Reliable home setup:** stable internet, professional workstation, quiet place to focus

- **Full-time availability,** overlapping at least 4 hours with Australian Eastern time



---



## Nice to Have (Makes You Stand Out)



- Experience growing accounts in the coaching, events, personal brand, or info-product space

- Light editing skills (CapCut, Premiere, or InShot) so you can ship a quick edit without waiting on the editor

- Basic design skills in Canva or Figma for covers, thumbnails, and quote graphics

- Experience running a podcast or YouTube long-form clip strategy

- Familiarity with AI tools (Claude, Opus Clip, Submagic) as accelerators

- Community management experience inside Skool, Circle, or
 Groups



---



## Who You Are



- You're chronically online in the best possible way and proud of it

- You can name the last 5 trends you saw blow up and explain why they worked

- You have opinions about hooks, captions, and thumbnails and can defend them

- You take feedback fast, iterate faster, and never take it personally

- You're obsessed with growth, not vanity metrics

- You want to be part of a team, not just a freelancer hiding behind

- You care about doing work you're proud of, at a high standard, consistently



---



## What You Get From Us



- A founder brand with real budget, real reach, and real pressure to grow

- Direct line to the founder and creative team (no agency layers, no politics)

- Clear briefs, fast feedback, and the ability to see your work go live the same day

- The chance to become the social engine behind one of Australia's fastest-growing founder brands

- Competitive full-time contractor pay (we pay above market for the right person)

- Long-term role with room to grow into a Head of Social position as the team scales



---



## How to Apply



Send an
 to 
 with the subject line:



**SMM Application - [Your Name]**



In the
, include:



1. A short 3 min VIDEO intro covering: who you are, where you're based, why this role fits you, what you know about our founder (Morgantnelson) , what trends you find are working right now and which one of our values resonated with you the most.

2. Links to 2-3 social accounts you have personally managed or grown, with specifics:

   - Starting numbers vs. current numbers

   - What you did to drive the growth

   - Standout posts (viral, high-converting, or breakthrough)

3. Your expected monthly rate (USD) for full-time work

4. Your earliest available start date



**Important:** Applications without a video or proof of growth will not be reviewed. We want to see what you've actually grown, not just read about it. Anonymised numbers are fine if you're under NDA.



We will only reply to shortlisted candidates. Shortlisted applicants will be invited to a paid test project (1 week of trend research + content calendar build) before final offer.



---



*Dream Out Loud is an equal-opportunity employer. We hire on skill, drive, and cultural fit.*

We built an AI that fixes that completely — would you be open to a quick 10 minute call to see if it makes sense for your business?" Applications without the audio recording will not be considered.

title: Experienced Customer Service VA
description:
CUSTOMER EXPERIENCE VA

Remote | Flexible Hours | Full-Time

Do you love writing messages that make someone’s day a little brighter? ?

We’re looking for a thoughtful, reliable, and customer-focused Customer Experience VA to join our growing team. If you enjoy solving problems through writing, value clarity and empathy in communication, and get excited about improving systems and experiences—this role might be your perfect fit.

As a brand, we design elevated kitchenware—think gold utensils, knife sets, and practical yet stylish tools. We sell on Amazon, Walmart, and Shopify, and we care just as much about our customers’ experience as we do about the quality of our products.



How to Apply

Ready to join us? Fill out this short form: 



What You’ll Do

Customer Delight & Engagement

 • Deliver warm, solution-focused written support across Amazon, Walmart, Shopify, and other customer platforms.

 • Turn occasional frowns into five-star 
nts, always with a can-do attitude.

 • Respond to inquiries and resolve issues while maintaining our friendly, elevated brand voice.

Product Review Monitoring

 • Track and respond to product reviews across platforms.

 • Identify trends in feedback and partner with the team to suggest meaningful improvements.

Reporting & Insights

 • Log customer issues, product concerns, and platform trends in organized reports.

title: NYC Restaurant Lead Researcher ( Lead Generation)
description:
Let's Get Lunch (letsgetlunch.nyc) is a NYC platform that helps office workers find prix-fixe lunch deals at real restaurants. We're populating our directory with restaurants that publicly advertise lunch specials. I'm hiring one researcher for ongoing  work — start with a paid trial of 10 restaurants, then scale to 30–40 hours/week if it goes well.

Rate: $2.10/hour, paid via OnlineJobs EasyPay.

What you'll do, per restaurant:



Research the restaurant on the web (their website, Instagram, Google Maps, Yelp, Resy/OpenTable) and confirm they publicly advertise a lunch special or prix-fixe lunch menu.

Capture structured data into a Google Sheet I'll provide: name, full address, neighborhood, cuisine, lunch special description, price, hours, days available, restaurant bio, owner/manager name, phone,
, website, Instagram, source URL, and date verified.

Select 4 landscape photos from the restaurant's own public sources (website, Resy/OpenTable, Google Business, Yelp, Instagram as last resort) — one entrée, one appetizer, one dessert, one ambience shot. No food blogs, no Yelp user uploads, no stock images, no vertical photos.

Verify each restaurant against its own website AND a Google search for "[restaurant name] lunch special" before marking complete. Aggregator articles can be outdated — primary sources only.

After my approval, upload approved listings to the live site form at letsgetlunch.nyc/list-your-restaurant.



The work has clear structure: Research is geographically scoped (I'll assign a specific NYC neighborhood) and uses a 3-category system (A: has a lunch special, goes live; B: has lunch but no special, kept for later outreach; C: skip). Full brief and rules provided once we start.

Volume target: 1–3 restaurants per hour at part-time hours, with full verification. Quality matters far more than speed. Lifting from "best NYC lunch deals" aggregator articles isn't research and won't pass review.

What you won't do: Make any commitments to restaurants, represent yourself as the owner of the site, scrape platforms with login walls, or make phone calls (this is research-only work).

Hours: Flexible. Research can be done any time that fits your schedule.

Trial: Paid trial of 10 restaurants ($21 at $2.10/hour). If quality is good, ongoing engagement at 30–40 hours/week.

What I value in applicants: Honesty about what you don't know matters more than experience with restaurants specifically. If you've done lead generation, list-building, or web research and you're willing to follow a detailed brief carefully, that's the foundation. Tell me what tools you've used (Apollo, Hunter, ZoomInfo, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator) and send a work sample if you have one.

salary: 870 per month plus bonus on KPI

title: Senior Healthcare Nurse Recruiter  (Resume & Experience Required)
description:
Job Title: Nurse Recruiter with Administrative Healthcare Experience



Employer: HomeLogic Healthcare



Job Description:



You must have previous Healthcare Recruitment Experience for recruiting registered nurses.



DO NOT APPPLY IF YOU DO NOT HAVE 1-2 YEARS EXPERIENCE OR PLAN TO WORK AN ADDITIONAL JOB FROM 9am EST - 4pm EST



HomeLogic Healthcare, a leading pediatric home care agency, is seeking an experienced Nurse Recruiter with strong background in administrative healthcare tasks, particularly in requesting and obtaining medical records and documentation. The ideal candidate will play a crucial role in facilitating communication with healthcare providers, assisting in the recruitment of qualified nurses, and supporting the overall administrative operations of our agency. A Bachelor's degree is required for this position. Due to the nature of this work, we will not consider candidates with another job during the hours of 9:00 AM - 3:00 PM EST.



Key Responsibilities:



Medical Records and Documentation:



Request, obtain, and organize client medical records and documentation from hospitals, medical clinics, and other healthcare providers.

Communicate with healthcare professionals via phone and
 to ensure timely and accurate receipt of necessary records and documentation.

Ensure all records are handled in compliance with HIPAA regulations, maintaining confidentiality at all times.

Nurse Recruitment and Staffing:



Assist in attracting and recruiting qualified nurses for pediatric home care positions.

Screen, interview, and coordinate with prospective nursing candidates to match them with the specific needs of our pediatric clients.

Maintain an active database of nursing candidates and manage their credentials.

Collaborate with the staffing team to ensure that staffing requirements are met promptly and effectively.

Administrative Duties:



General administrative tasks, including organizing, filing, and managing medical records and other related documentation.

Create and manage spreadsheets to track and monitor client information, staffing data, and other important metrics.

Coordinate schedules, appointments, and meetings for internal staff, clients, and healthcare providers.







Required:

A Bachelor's degree is required. (Nursing Preferred)

Previous experience in administrative healthcare settings, especially in requesting and obtaining medical records.

Excellent phone skills and the ability to communicate effectively and professionally with hospitals, medical clinics, and healthcare providers.

Strong organizational and time-management skills, with the ability to handle multiple tasks simultaneously.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word, etc.) and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets).

Preferred:

Nursing experience (or healthcare background) is highly preferred but not required.

Previous experience in healthcare staffing recruitment is a plus.

Experience with social media management and marketing is an asset.

Basic graphic design skills (using tools like Canva or Adobe Suite) are a plus.

Skills and Attributes:



Strong communication and interpersonal skills.

Excellent attention to detail and accuracy in managing sensitive information.

Proactive, self-motivated, and able to work independently with minimal supervision.

Ability to adapt and learn quickly in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.

Strong sense of confidentiality and professionalism when dealing with sensitive client and patient information.



Work Hours and Environment:



Due to the nature of this position, candidates with another job during these hours will not be considered. The role requires access to a computer, reliable internet, and a quiet, dedicated workspace.



Application Process:

To apply, please submit the following:



Resume outlining your relevant experience, particularly in healthcare administration and recruitment.

What You’ll Do: You will call and qualify leads from our global pipeline and follow up via phone, SMS, WhatsApp, and
. You will book qualified appointments on the calendar for the Founder and, when ready, close straightforward deals yourself. You will nurture interested prospects by overcoming objections, sharing information, and maintaining 
ntum until purchase. You will learn the product (with training and scripts provided) to confidently explain features, pricing, and ROI. title: UGC Talent Manager Wanted
description:
At Blackboard Agency, we create scroll-stopping, high-performing ads for some of the fastest-growing DTC and ecommerce brands globally.



We’re a small team building something ambitious.

We care about performance, we care about creative, and we care about doing work that actually moves the needle.



Now, we’re looking for a UGC Talent Manager to help us scale.



The Role



You will own everything talent.



From sourcing and outreach to systems, relationships, and performance — this role is end-to-end.



You’ll be building and managing a global network of high-performing UGC creators and influencers across Australia, the UK, the US, and beyond.



This is not a maintenance role.

This is a build, optimise, and scale role.



What You’ll Be Doing



-> Source and recruit top-tier UGC creators globally

-> Manage outreach, negotiations, and ongoing relationships

-> Build and optimise talent pipelines across TikTok, Instagram, etc.

-> Handle whitelisting / partnership ads coordination

-> Manage contracts, usage rights, and deliverables

-> Build internal systems (ClickUp or similar)

-> Develop AI-driven workflows for outreach and tracking

-> Work closely with the creative team to match talent to concepts

-> Continuously improve the quality of talent and systems



What We’re Looking For



-> Highly independent — you take ownership

-> Strong communicator with great people skills

-> Deep understanding of UGC, creators, and paid ads

-> Strong judgement — you know what good talent looks like

-> Organised and systems-focused

-> Comfortable juggling multiple moving parts





Non-Negotiable



-> You must be strong with AI tools (Claude, automations, workflows, etc.)

-> You’re excited to build systems from scratch

-> You’re willing to work hard and push for excellence

-> MUST be Fluent in English (you’ll be client-facing)



The Reality



We’ll be honest.

We move fast. We expect a lot. The standards are high.

title: Project Manager – Construction Operations
description:
Join a growing commercial construction-related company and play a key role in managing projects from award through completion while supporting bid coordination and pipeline follow-ups.



This role is ideal for someone highly organized, proactive, and comfortable working across both operations and sales support. You’ll help ensure projects are delivered smoothly while maintaining strong pipeline visibility, follow-up discipline, and communication between customers, field teams, and internal stakeholders.



We’re looking for someone who can take ownership, manage multiple moving parts, and thrive in a fast-paced environment where project execution and operational coordination go hand in hand.



Responsibilities:

- Take ownership of projects from handoff through completion.

- Coordinate project scheduling, logistics, timelines, and resource allocation.

- Work closely with customers, contractors, field teams, and internal stakeholders to ensure smooth project delivery.

- Support installation planning and help ensure projects meet quality and compliance standards.

- Monitor project progress and proactively help resolve issues that may affect timelines or customer experience.

- Manage bid follow-ups and pipeline coordination across assigned regions.

- Track, update, and maintain accurate opportunities and project data within HubSpot CRM.

- Follow up with contractors, estimators, and decision-makers regarding outstanding bids and active opportunities.

- Identify priority opportunities and maintain organized follow-up processes.

- Support outside sales representatives by providing project updates, pipeline visibility, and operational coordination.

- Help improve internal workflows, CRM processes, and project tracking systems.

- Assist in maintaining strong communication between sales and operations teams throughout the project lifecycle.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience in project management, construction coordination, operations, or related industries.

- Previous experience supporting commercial construction, specialty contracting, healthcare construction environments, or field operations is highly preferred.

- Strong understanding of project coordination, scheduling, and operational workflows.

- Experience managing multiple projects, timelines, and priorities simultaneously.

- Experience with CRM systems such as HubSpot is strongly preferred.

- Comfortable handling bid follow-ups, pipeline tracking, and customer coordination.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and proactive.

- Comfortable working in a fast-paced and entrepreneurial environment.

- Strong problem-solving and follow-through skills.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US or Canada-based clients is preferred.

- Must be available to work graveyard hours aligned with U.S. time zones.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 75,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link and copy and paste this Job ID: rectOmE5kGLVkiZCZ into your

title: $8,000 From ONE Partnership - Need Crypto Network, Not Experience (Remote BD)
description:
Job Description:

We’re a DeFi protocol launching game-changing LP bond technology. We need Business Development partners who can introduce us to crypto launchpads, blockchain projects, and DeFi communities.





THE OPPORTUNITY:

Every successful introduction that leads to partnership earns you serious money. One good partnership could net you $5,000-10,000 in your first month.





COMPENSATION:

Monetize your network through three massive income streams: guaranteed ETH salary, instant token unlocks, and recurring commissions. We pay you to open doors you’ve already built, while we handle 100% of the closing.



Guaranteed Base Pay: You will receive $10/hour (capped at 10 hours/week),       for simply activating your network. 50% paid in Ethereum (ETH) for immediate cash and 50% in $GMI tokens, which are subject to an 18-month vesting schedule, building a long-term position in the $GMI mutli-chain ecosystem.



Performance Bonus: Every 5 successful partnership you close triggers an immediate unlock of 20% your vested tokens. This allows you to bypass the 18-month vesting period and access your earnings as soon as you deliver results.

Note: A "successful partnership" is defined by the project signing the LP Bonds integration agreement and going live on our marketplace.



Additional Commission: 

- 25% commission on ALL upgrade fees from your partnerships

- Level 2 upgrades: $40 upgrade fee, you get $10 each

- Level 3 upgrades: $80 upgrade fee, you get $20 each

- Level 4 upgrades: $160 upgrade fee, you get $40 each



-  $500 bonus when your partnerships hit 25 Level 4 bonds

-  $2,000 bonus at 100 Level 4 bonds

-  $5,000 bonus at 300 Level 4 bonds

-  Realistic month 1 earnings: $2,000-5,000

- Total 90-day potential: $20,000+



YOU HAVE:

- Existing connections in crypto (launchpads, DAOs, blockchain projects)

-
/
 relationships with project founders or marketing heads

- Understanding of DeFi/crypto space

- Hunger to earn based on results, not hours





YOU DON’T NEED:

- To close deals (I handle that)

- Any upfront investment

- Previous BD experience (connections matter more)

- Full-time commitment (work your own schedule)





THE ROLE:

Simply introduce me to decision-makers at crypto projects. I close the deals, you collect commissions. Every user from your partnerships who upgrades their bonds puts money in your pocket..

Example: ONE medium-sized launchpad partnership generating 100 L4 bonds = $8,000 for you.



Ready to turn your crypto connections into serious income?



Apply with:

- List 3-5 crypto projects/launchpads you have connections with

- Your
 handle

- Brief description of your crypto involvement



We need partners who see the opportunity and want to run with it. Start earning within days of your first successful introduction!

title: Senior Full-Stack Developer (DeFi and NFT Projects)
description:
About Us

LP Bonds. Live DeFi protocol. 8+ chains. 50+ pools. Real users. Real TVL. We built this with a team most startups would call "impossible." We're not looking for someone who's done 10 years of safe corporate blockchain work. We're looking for someone who's hungry enough to own an entire protocol's technical stack and sharp enough to not break it.



THE ROLE

 You own everything technical. Smart contracts. Frontend. Backend. New chain deployments. DEX integrations. Infrastructure. There's no senior engineer above you to review your code. There's no architect drawing diagrams for you. You are the engineering department.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Solidity & Contracts:

- Deploy and manage production smart contracts across EVM chains - Bond NFTs, LP vaults, yield engines, upgrade systems, marketplace

- Ship new chain deployments end-to-end. We hand you a chain, you hand us live contracts.

- Integrate with DEX protocols (Camelot, PancakeSwap, Uniswap) at the contract level

- Security is your religion. You think about how things break before you think about how they work.



Frontend:

- React/Next.js - build and maintain the full user-facing application

- Web3 wallet integrations, stats dashboard, Bond NFT marketplace

- If the UI is broken, it's your problem. If it's slow, it's your problem.



Backend & Infra:

- Node.js API, MongoDB, IPFS

- Multi-chain indexing and event monitoring

- Keep 8+ chain deployments healthy simultaneously



WHO YOU ARE:

- You've written Solidity that's been deployed to mainnet. Even once. Even small. You've felt the weight of real money in your contract.

- You can build a full-stack app alone. Not "I contributed to a team project" - you built it.

- You learn by doing, not by asking. You hit a wall, you Google it, you read the docs, you figure it out, you ship.

- You're not waiting for permission. You see something broken, you fix it. You see something missing, you build it.

- You're young, hungry, and slightly terrified of how much responsibility this is. Good. That fear keeps you sharp.





WE CARE ABOUT:

- What you've shipped. Show us. Links or it didn't happen.

- How fast you learn when thrown into something you've never done

- Whether you take ownership or make excuses

- Whether you stay up until 3am because the bug is bothering you, not because someone told you to



This is a small team building something most of DeFi hasn't figured out yet. You will be stretched. You will ship things you didn't think you could ship. You will learn more here than anywhere else because there's no one to hide behind.



If that excites you, apply. If it scares you, even better - apply anyway.

title: Product Development Assistant (Apparel)
description:
Job Title: Product Development Assistant (Apparel)

Salary: 50k PHP per month (depending on experience)



---



Company Description



Insomnia Visuals is a Los Angeles-based alternative streetwear and apparel brand with customers all over the world. We operate both DTC and wholesale, producing hundreds of styles per year. Our team is fast-paced, detail-oriented, and focused on building a globally recognized brand. We currently have tea
mbers across the U.S., Philippines, and Asia.



---



Job Summary



We’re looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Product Development Assistant to support our product team across design, sampling, and production. This role is execution-heavy and requires someone who can track a high volume of styles, communicate with overseas factories, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks.



You will be working directly with our product, design, and supply chain teams to keep development moving efficiently across 1000+ styles per year.



THIS IS A FULL-TIME ROLE. If you are working multiple jobs or freelancing, this is NOT a fit. We are looking for someone long-term who wants to grow within the company.



---



Day-to-Day Tasks Include:



* Tracking styles from concept to sampling to production

* Maintaining and updating product data (materials, trims, measurements, costing)

* Communicating with manufacturers on samples, revisions, and timelines

* Following up daily to ensure samples and production stay on schedule

* Managing sample tracking (what’s in development, shipped, approved, etc.)

* Assisting with tech pack organization, revisions, and comments

* Cross-checking product details to ensure accuracy before production

* Inputting and updating costing sheets and margin tracking

* Flagging delays, errors, or missing information proactively



---



MUST HAVE:



3+ years experience in apparel product development, sourcing, or production

MUST HAVE GRADUATED WITH A DEGREE FROM A FASHION SCHOOL

Experience working with overseas manufacturers (China preferred)

Strong understanding of tech packs, garments, and materials

HIGH attention to detail

Excellent written and spoken English

Experience with tools like Google Sheets / Excel

Comfortable working full-time and handling multiple styles at once



IF YOU DO NOT HAVE ALL OF THE ABOVE, DO NOT APPLY.



---



Qualifications:



* Reliable high-speed internet and a working webcam

* Able to work independently without constant supervision

* Highly organized and able to manage multiple workflows

* Strong communication and follow-up skills

* ON TIME, EVERY DAY



---



Nice to Have:



* Experience with Airtable or PLM systems

* Experience working with fashion brands

* Experience in high-SKU or fast-paced apparel environments

* Basic understanding of costing and margins



---



What We Offer:



Competitive salary with room to grow

Long-term, stable role within a growing company

A focused, high-performance team environment

Clear systems and processes



---



Application Process:
in the subject line of your application.



Submit:

1. Resume

2. A SHORT, CUSTOM cover letter explaining why you are a strong fit with specific examples of relevant work experience.

3. Your internet speed test screenshot



IF YOU SEND A GENERIC OR COPY-PASTED COVER LETTER OR MESSAGE TO ME, IT WILL BE DISCARDED. NO AI. IM ONLY LOOKING FOR SOMETHING SHORT AND SWEET TO TELL ME WHY YOU SHOULD GET THIS JOB. YOU DONT NEED AI TO WRITE THIS. 3-4 SENTENCES MAX.



We are looking for detail-oriented, serious applicants only. This is a critical role in the company.



If we like your application, we will reach out with a link to schedule an interview. We are looking to hire this NOW. for starting ASAP.

title: Fractional Finance Lead — Books Cleanup, Financial Model & Ongoing Advisory (High-Ticket Info Product / Coaching Busines
description:
Fractional Finance Lead — Books Cleanup, Financial Model & Ongoing Advisory

(High-Ticket Info Product / Coaching Business)



Phase 1 + 2: Fixed price | Phase 3: ~$1,200/month retainer | Long-term role



???? Note: This role requires working across US time zones with occasional EU overlap. Philippines-based applicants with experience in US-based online coaching businesses are strongly preferred.



HARD FILTER — READ BEFORE APPLYING

You must have direct hands-on experience working with high-ticket info product, coaching, or creator economy businesses. Not SaaS. Not e-commerce. Not traditional agency. Specifically the high-ticket online coaching world. If you've never built a financial model or cleaned books for a coaching or info product business doing $1M+ ARR, please do not apply.



ABOUT US

We're a high-ticket coaching and info product business in the creator economy doing $100K–$160K/month in revenue. We sell a tiered accelerator program (Accelerator ? VIP ? Elite), continuation offers, and a low-ticket community that funnels into high-ticket. We're scaling fast — but we're making every decision from gut feel and Slack panic instead of clean data. We need someone who can build the financial clarity we need to scale, then stay on as our fractional finance advisor.



YOU NEED TO ALREADY UNDERSTAND — WITHOUT US EXPLAINING

? Webinar ? application ? high-ticket sales funnel economics

? The cash flow gap between pay-in-full, external financing (Affirm/Klarna), and internal payment plans

? Processor holds, reserves, and chargeback reserves on Stripe and PayPal

? LTV mechanics across front-end and continuation/backend offers

? How to model a coaching team's capacity vs. revenue per coach

? The lag between hiring a sales, marketing, or coaching role and when they generate return



THE WORK — THREE PHASES



PHASE 1 — Books cleanup (one-time)

- Migrate from QuickBooks to Xero

- Reconcile and clean books from August 2025 to current

- Set up tracking categories to separate our coaching business from a small legacy video production line on the same entity

- Deliver a clean accrual P&L and cash flow showing actual historical profitability

- Accounts: Chase (primary), Bank of America (legacy), AmEx, Stripe, PayPal, Fundbases, WAP



PHASE 2 — Financial model build (one-time)

- Assumptions tab: LTV, customers per offer tier, PIF vs payment plan mix, processor fees, gross margin, continuation offer attach rate, low-ticket ? high-ticket conversion

- Headcount tab: plug in any new hire and immediately see P&L and cash flow impact, with realistic ramp time modelled before they generate return

- Overhead tab: software subscriptions and recurring fixed costs

- 2–3 year monthly P&L with quarterly and annual rollups

- Monthly cash flow (weekly during tight stretches)

- Clean enough that a non-finance founder can toggle assumptions and instantly see the impact



PHASE 3 — Ongoing fractional advisor (~$1,200/month)

- Maintain and update the model as the business changes

- Advise on hiring, pricing, offer structure, and scaling decisions

- Regular working sessions (monthly or bi-weekly cadence TBD)

- Coordinate with our US-based tax preparer at year-end

- Available for ad-hoc strategic finance questions



WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE IN 90 DAYS

? Clean Xero books from August 2025 to current

? We know exactly how profitable we've been, month by month

? A working financial model driving every hiring and scaling decision

? Zero decisions from gut feel — everything comes from data



COMPENSATION

- Phase 1: Propose your fixed price

- Phase 2: Propose your fixed price

- Phase 3: ~$1,200/month, grows with scope



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Send an
 to 
 (remove spaces) with the following:

Subject: Your Name - Years of Experience



2. Send a loom video: (IMPORTANT! No loom = no interview)

-  Name the high-ticket info product, coaching, or creator economy businesses you've worked with — specific client type and revenue range, not just "online businesses."

- Share a redacted or anonymized financial model for a coaching or info product business. Show us the assumptions tab, headcount logic, and how toggles flow through to P&L and cash flow.

- Propose your fixed price for Phase 1 and Phase 2, and your monthly rate for Phase 3.

- Your timezone and weekly availability.



? We shortlist based on relevance of past clients first, model quality second, price third.

title: Full-Time AI Automation Specialist (GHL + N8N + Make.com)

This is a long-term role with real growth potential. We invest in our team's tools and skills, including a paid Claude AI membership to supercharge your productivity.



What You'll Be Doing

- Building more advanced custom solutions using Google Apps Script or Python when needed (we'll support you with Claude for the heavy lifting)

title: Virtual Assistant (Dental Practice Growth & Patient Experience Coordinator)
description:
Remote | Part-Time ? Full-Time Growth Opportunity



About Us

Amore Dentistry is a modern, holistic dental practice focused on high-level patient care, efficiency, and a luxury experience. We are growing quickly and looking for a detail-oriented, proactive Virtual Assistant who can help manage patient communication, scheduling, and business operations—while evolving into a key role in marketing and practice growth.



Role Overview



This is NOT a basic assistant role. You will start by managing patient communication and scheduling but will grow into helping oversee systems, patient experience, and eventually social media + operational strategy.



We are looking for someone sharp, organized, and highly reliable who wants to grow with a business long-term.



Core Responsibilities (Phase 1)



Patient Communication & Scheduling



Answer incoming calls (via VOIP system) professionally and warmly

Respond to texts,
s, and website inquiries

Schedule, confirm, and reschedule patient appointments

Manage daily schedule to optimize production and efficiency



Patient Follow-Up & Experience



Follow up with new leads and unscheduled treatment

Send reminders and reactivation messages

Request and track patient reviews (Google, etc.)

Ensure every patient interaction feels high-touch and personalized



Administrative Support



Maintain accurate patient records

Coordinate forms, paperwork, and onboarding

Assist with insurance/basic admin tasks if needed

Growth Responsibilities (Phase 2 ? 3)



As you grow into the role, you will:



Help manage and improve office systems and workflows

Assist with KPI tracking (production, case acceptance, etc.)

Oversee patient journey from first contact ? completed treatment

Manage and post on social media (Instagram, TikTok, etc.)

Coordinate marketing initiatives and campaigns

Act as a “remote office manager” / operations lead

Ideal Candidate

Strong communication skills (friendly, confident, articulate)

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive problem-solver (doesn’t wait to be told what to do)

Comfortable handling patients and sensitive conversations

Tech-savvy (can quickly learn software systems)

Growth mindset — wants to evolve into a bigger role

Experience in dental, medical, or concierge client services is a PLUS

Tools You May Use

Scheduling software (Dentrix, OpenDental, ORYX etc.)

VOIP phone systems

Google Workspace

CRM / patient communication tools

Social media platforms

Schedule & Compensation

Remote position

Starting part-time (20–30 hrs/week), opportunity for full-time

Flexible hours, but must overlap with business hours (EST)

Competitive hourly pay based on experience

Performance-based bonuses available

What Success Looks Like

A smooth, organized schedule with minimal gaps

Patients feel cared for and consistently followed up with

Increased case acceptance and patient retention

Strong online presence and growing reviews

How to Apply



Please submit:



A short video (1–2 minutes) introducing yourself

Your resume

A brief answer to:

“How would you handle a patient who is hesitant to schedule treatment?”

Why This Role is Different

I WOULD LIKE TO DO AN INTERVIEW, THIS WILL BE FUN :D



This is an opportunity to grow into a high-level operations + marketing role within a rapidly expanding dental brand. If you’re looking for something long-term where you can take ownership and grow, this is it.

title: HIGH-PERFORMANCE (COLLECTIONS/SALES) CLOSER
description:
We are hiring EXPERIENCED, DRIVEN closers who are confident on the phone and want to earn based on performance.

This is NOT a basic call center job. If you are competitive, persuasive, and know how to control a conversation—keep reading.

If you prefer low pressure, scripts only, or being told what to do all day—this is NOT for you.



WHAT YOU’LL DO:



• Handle inbound calls from U.S. consumers responding to text messages

• Take control of conversations and move them toward resolution

• Negotiate and CLOSE payments

• Work in a fast-paced, results-driven environment



WHO WE WANT:



• Strong, confident English (clear speaking voice)

• Comfortable asking for payment directly

• Competitive mindset—you like to win

• Can handle rejection without slowing down

• Self-motivated (no supervision needed)

• Fast thinker who can adjust in real time



WHAT WE REQUIRE:



• EXTREMELY money motivated

• PERFECT attendance (no exceptions)

• Full-time only (no part-time available)

• Strong, stable internet connection

• Newer laptop preferred (desktop acceptable)



WHO THIS IS NOT FOR:



• Low energy or passive personalities

• People who avoid pressure or difficult conversations

• Script-only agents with no personality

• Anyone who needs constant handholding



COMPENSATION:



• Hourly pay + aggressive performance bonuses

• NO CAP on bonuses

• Top performers earn significantly more

• Weekly pay + monthly bonus payouts



WHY JOIN US:



• Consistent inbound call volume from texting campaigns

• High-performance team environment

• Real opportunity to grow into leadership



• NO weekends ever

TO APPLY:

Salary $650

What You’ll Do

-Multi-Platform Management: Daily publishing and optimization for YouTube, TikTok,
, Instagram, and Google Business Profile.

description:

This role is execution-focused. You will take captured 
nts and turn them into engaging posts across multiple platforms, with most content edited and ready to publish within one week of capture.



?

Content Organization

Performance & Iteration



* Identify strong hooks and 
nts from raw footage

?



Content Themes

* Travel and world exploration

* Homeschooling / learning through experience

* Packing, logistics, and systems

* Real-life 
nts, challenges, and wins

?



Requirements

?



Bonus Skills

?

What You’ll Do

Key Responsibilities:

Who You Are
