title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
Hiring  Cold callers to Help Build Local Business In the USA

 Base pay $600 per month (after two week training) plus commissions OTE each month $1000-$1500

Company: Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)

Location: Remote - 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)

Type: Full-time Independent Contractor

---

The Story Behind Start Over

Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.

Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)

It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.

---

Why We Need You

We are looking for 3 cold callers each week to join the team now. We need in total another 180 cold callers within 3 months so this team and the level of recruitment will grow quickly to help launch and fill  up a weekly webinar  the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ cold callers across all our territories.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.

closers then to attend a webinar designed to close them for us





The 14-Day Trial

We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:

$15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

Day 1: Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

Day 2 onwards: Full production with daily minimums

Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2

---

What Makes This Role Different

1. You are not hustling a bad offer Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.

2. You are part of a real team. We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.

3. You have a growth path. Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.

4. You get real support. Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.

---

The Daily Reality

Let us be honest about what the day looks like:

9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

Monday to Friday, five nights a week

300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

10+ event bookings per day (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)

It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.

---

We Are Looking For Someone Who

Must have:

2+ years phone sales or closing experience

OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+ verified on your profile

NBI clearance (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

Own Zoom Pro account

Reliable internet (25+ Mbps - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset

Will thrive if you:

Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

Care about what you sell, not just about commission

Take coaching well

Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

Want a long-term role, not a quick gig

---

Honest Caveats

The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.

---

Verification and Accountability

We use:

TimeProof (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

GoHighLevel / Ringover (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

Shared call tracker (real-time logging)

Random call audits (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)

This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

We know you are working the hours you claim

You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls

We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.

Zero tolerance for fraud: Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.

---

Termination

Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.

---

Group Interview - MONDAY

We are hosting a group interview tomorrow (Monday) at 7pm Manila time (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).





Zoom link:





 









This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

Webcam and microphone working

Professional background and attire

Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

Questions about the role

If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.

---

How To Apply

Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:

Name and location

Internet speed test screenshot (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

ID Proof score (60+ required) and NBI clearance status



Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift consistently

No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.

---

Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for Three STRONG cold calllers NOW for Mississippi

We look forward to meeting you tomorrow.

title: Google Ads Strategist for Shopify DTC Food & Wellness Brand
description:
Inspired Trading is looking for an experienced Google Ads Strategist to help grow our Shopify e-commerce store.



We are a Jamaican-owned e-commerce brand selling authentic Jamaican products, including herbal teas, wellness products, spices, sauces, sweets, and specialty grocery items to customers in the United States and other markets.



We are looking for someone who understands how to use Google Ads to launch and grow direct-to-consumer food, wellness, and specialty grocery products.



This is not a basic “run ads” role. We need someone who can think strategically, work with a small business budget, troubleshoot campaigns, review product feeds, improve tracking, and help us build a profitable Google Ads program for Shopify.



The right person will be practical, analytical, honest, and able to explain Google Ads clearly to a business owner.



About the Brand



Inspired Trading brings authentic Jamaican products to customers who love Caribbean food, traditional herbal teas, island-inspired wellness, and specialty grocery items.



Our product range includes:



Jamaican herbal teas

Women’s and men’s wellness teas

Jamaican sauces and spices

Specialty grocery items

Jamaican sweets and snacks

Seasonal gift items and bundles



We are now focused on growing our Shopify direct-to-consumer sales and reducing our dependence on marketplaces such as Amazon, eBay, and Etsy.



Minimum Experience Required



Applicants must have:



Minimum 3 years of hands-on Google Ads experience

Experience managing Google Ads for Shopify or e-commerce brands

Experience with Google Merchant Center

Experience with Shopping campaigns

Experience with Performance Max campaigns

Experience with Search campaigns

Experience checking or troubleshooting conversion tracking

Experience working with small or medium-sized business budgets



Experience with food, beverage, grocery, wellness, herbal products, natural products, or DTC consumer brands is strongly preferred.



Responsibilities



The Google Ads Strategist will help us:



Create a practical Google Ads strategy for Shopify sales

Recommend which products, bundles, and offers to advertise

Plan campaigns for DTC food, herbal tea, wellness, and grocery products

Set up and optimize Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns

Review Google Merchant Center and product feed issues

Check product titles, descriptions, categories, and feed quality

Review and troubleshoot conversion tracking

Monitor search terms and add negative keywords

Work within an SME budget and reduce wasted ad spend

Troubleshoot campaigns that get clicks but no sales

Review landing pages, offers, pricing, and product selection

Provide simple weekly reports with clear recommendations

Help develop a 30-day and 90-day Google Ads growth plan

What We Are Looking For



We are looking for someone who can answer questions like:



Which products should we advertise first and why?

How would you launch a new DTC food product using Google Ads?

Should we start with Search, Shopping, Performance Max, or a combination?

How would you structure campaigns for a small budget?

What would you do if a campaign is getting clicks but no conversions?

How would you know whether the issue is the ad, product, offer, landing page, price, tracking, or audience?

How would you approach seasonal campaigns such as Mother’s Day, Christmas, Black Friday, and Caribbean holiday gifting?



We want someone who can think commercially, not just manage buttons inside Google Ads.



First Assignment



The first assignment will be a structured review of our Google Ads and Shopify setup.



You may be asked to provide:



Google Ads account audit

Conversion tracking check

Google Merchant Center review

Product feed recommendations

Recommended campaign structure

Priority products to advertise

Suggested starting budget

Troubleshooting notes

30-day action plan

90-day growth roadmap

Application Instructions



To apply, please start your application with this phrase:



“I have 3+ years of Google Ads experience.”



Applications that do not include this phrase may not be reviewed.



Please include the following:



Your updated resume or CV

A short summary of your Google Ads experience

Examples of Shopify or e-commerce campaigns you have worked on

Your answers to the screening questions below

Your hourly rate

Your weekly availability



Please answer in your own words. We are not looking for ChatGPT-generated or copy-and-paste responses. We want genuine answers based on your real experience.



Applications without a resume/CV and complete answers to the screening questions will not be reviewed.



Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

title: Remote Construction Project Manager — Boutique Hospitality Build
description:
About the Project                                                           

                                                                                

  We are building a small-footprint, high-end hospitality property in the       

  Northeast US. The owner is acting as general contractor. We're hiring a remote

   part-time Construction Project Manager to be the project office — keeping    

  schedule, money, and procurement on track so the owner can spend his time   

  on-site and with subcontractors, not chasing paperwork.



  What You'll Do



  - Schedule: Build and maintain the master schedule.     

  Sequence trades, track critical path, flag slips early.

  - Bid leveling: Run apples-to-apples comparisons across subcontractor bids    

  (excavation, framing, electrical, plumbing, deck, pools, etc.). Surface scope 

  gaps.                                        

  - Sub coordination: Manage mobilization dates, RFIs, change orders, punch     

  lists. Draft clear, professional
s, make phone calls, text to US-based subs.                     

  - Procurement: Track lead times, deposits, and delivery windows for structural

   materials, modular elements, fixtures, and FF&E from US and overseas         

  suppliers.                                                                  

  - Document control: Organize drawings, RFIs, submittals, and inspection       

  reports in Google Drive with clean, consistent naming.                        

  - Cost tracking: Maintain a running tally vs. the project budget by line item.

   Flag overages before they compound.                                          

  - Site documentation review: Review weekly photos/video from the field for  

  quality and completeness.                                                     

  - Invoice review & AP: Verify vendor invoices against scope, flag           

  discrepancies, queue for owner approval.                                      

  - Sourcing coordination including international (China) sourcing if you have

  that experience.                                                              

                                                                              

  You're a Strong Fit If You Have                                               

                                                                              

  - 2+ years of construction management, project engineering, architecture, or  

  civil engineering experience                                                

  - A degree in construction management, civil engineering, or architecture     

  - Worked on US-based commercial or high-end residential projects              

  - Solid familiarity with US building products and conventions — dimensional   

  lumber, framing standards, mechanical/electrical/plumbing systems             

  - A track record of sequencing trades and spotting critical-path risk         

  - Strong written English — you'll draft RFI
s, sub instructions, and     

  weekly status reports                                                         

  - A bias toward proposing solutions, not just flagging problems                    

                                                                                

  Tools                                                                         

                                                                                

  Google Drive · Slack ·
  

                                                                                

  ---                                                                         

  To Apply                                     

          

  Please include all of the following — applications missing any item will be

  skipped:                                                                      

   

  1. The word STARGAZER at the top of your reply (confirms you read this        

  carefully).                                                                 

  2. A 2–3 paragraph intro covering: your construction background, the most     

  complex project you've coordinated, and one specific example of a sequencing, 

  sourcing, or cost issue you caught and solved.

  3. A link or attachment to a work sample — a schedule,  

  bid leveling sheet, RFI log, cost-tracking workbook, or weekly status report  

  you've actually produced.                                                                       

  Generic copy-paste applications, AI-generated cover letters, or replies       

  missing the code word will be discarded.

title: Reddit + X researcher / writer — long-term, $1,000+/mo
description:
I run a couple of SaaS products (you'll work on Flipbooker to start, and grow into others) and need help with online research and engagement. The work is varied, expect different things most days:



Find old Reddit threads where my product is actually a good answer to someone's question, and write a thoughtful comment. I have a tool that drafts these in my voice (or your voice, if that turns out to be better)... your job is to read what it spits out, d
 if it's any good, edit it until it sounds human, and post it. Or skip it if the thread isn't worth it.

Engage in real conversations on X where I/my platform would have something useful to add

Craft captions and hooks for short-form videos that one of my platforms can help create

Crafting interesting lead lists in Exa.ai websets for our sales guys (it's a search tool, which I'll teach you, easy to learn)

Tell me weekly what's working and what isn't so we can reassess



What I actually need from you:



English that reads like you grew up online in the US, trolling reddit for silly stuff. Not "I scored well on IELTS" English, but the kind where you've been on Reddit or other internet forums for years and you can tell when a comment sounds like ChatGPT wrote it. Maybe you go "ugh, not another AI post" - that probably means you have the taste.

You're already on the internet a lot for fun. You know what subreddits are. You know the difference between how people write on r/AskReddit vs. r/personalfinance. You've laughed at 
s this week, and maybe know too many of them.

Judgment. You can tell when a thread is worth replying to vs. when it would feel artificial and get removed for astroturfing. You can tell when an AI draft sounds robotic and make it funny or more helpful.

You actually pay attention to writing. You notice when a sentence is slightly off.

You'll tell me honestly when something isn't working instead of pretending it is.



I don't care about your degree, agency experience, or follower count. I care how you think and write.



To apply, do this:



Find a Reddit post from at least 6 months ago where someone asked a question you actually know the answer to. Anything... it could be cooking, fitness, tech, parenting, doesn't matter.

Write a
word reply that would actually help them. Write it yourself. Do not use AI. I will know, and besides I really want to see how you think, so robots thinking like robots doesn't help us here.

Send me: the link to the original post, your would-be reply pasted as text, and one or two sentences on why you picked that thread and that reply style.



No task = I won't reply. AI-written reply... I probably won't reply, unless somehow I miss it AND your task result is great. 



I'm not a typical hierarchy driven business owner - I want your real thoughts, your real opinions, and for you to challenge my thoughts when you think they are wrong, or help me figure things out. 



I also, with that said, will sometimes have things that I DO really need one in some specific way, and I'll let you know WHY if so, not just saying 'trust me' or 'I'm the boss'.



Pay:



$1,000-1,200/mo to start, 30-40 hrs/week, depending on the writing sample and how I expect this to work 

Paid biweekly via Wise (and if you prefer the Payoneer thing onlinejobs does, we can talk about it)

Ideally, this will be a long-term thing - if we make it to end of year, you'll get a full 13th-month bonus (a full-month's pay) - not pro-rated, even though this post is going up in May. I like it when people like working with me.

title: Executive Assistant VA
description:
We are hiring a full-scope Executive / Virtual Assistant who can function as the operational right hand of the CEO. This is not a single-function VA role. You will touch almost every part of the business — from managing the executive calendar to filing Amazon cases, booking tradeshow booths, reconciling invoices, and communicating with customers. If you thrive on variety, move quickly, and take initiative without being asked twice, this role was built for you.



Responsibilities

Executive & C-Suite Support

• Manage CEO
 inbox — triage, draft responses, flag urgent items, and ensure zero dropped balls

• Own calendar management: schedule meetings, protect focus blocks, coordinate across time zones

• Prepare agendas, meeting notes, and follow-up action items

• Handle confidential correspondence and sensitive business communications with discretion

• Research, compile briefing documents, and prepare talking points ahead of important calls

• Coordinate tasks across internal tea
mbers and external vendors on behalf of the CEO



Customer Service

• Serve as a primary point of contact for inbound customer inquiries via
, Amazon messaging, Walmart messaging, and web forms

• Handle order status questions, shipping inquiries, product questions, and complaints professionally

• Issue replacements, initiate refunds, and follow return/exchange SOPs

• Escalate complex or high-value issues to the appropriate tea
mber with a full written summary

• Maintain response time targets (Amazon 24-hour SLA and Walmart 48-hour SLA)

• Document recurring customer issues and flag patterns to the team



Amazon & Walmart Seller Operations - You will be a backup to this team in house already

• Monitor Amazon Seller Central and Walmart Seller Central dashboards daily

• Open, track, and follow up on Amazon support cases (listing issues, stranded inventory, suppressed listings, reimbursement claims)

• Process FBM orders and coordinate shipment confirmations

• Manage buyer-seller messaging; respond to feedback and reviews per policy

• Monitor account health metrics and flag anomalies

• Assist with listing maintenance: updating copy, images, pricing, and backend keywords as directed

• Support Walmart Seller Central operations including order management and case filing



Order Processing & Sales Support

• Receive and process incoming B2B purchase orders via
, phone, and CRM

• Enter orders into QuickBooks and Method CRM with accuracy

• Confirm order details with customers and communicate estimated ship dates

• Coordinate with warehouse/logistics on order fulfillment and shipping timelines

• Follow up on open quotes and outstanding proposals

• Maintain organized records of all orders and correspondence



Logistics & Shipping Coordination

• Work with freight carriers, 3PLs, and ShipStation to coordinate domestic and international shipments

• Obtain and compare freight quotes for LTL and FTL shipments

• Track shipments and proactively communicate delays to customers and the team

• Process bills of lading, freight invoices, and carrier paperwork

• Assist with FBA shipment creation, box content files, and label compliance

• Support claims for lost, damaged, or delayed freight shipments



Tradeshow & Event Management

• Research and identify relevant industry tradeshows, expos, and conferences

• Complete exhibitor applications and secure booth reservations by deadlines

• Manage all tradeshow logistics: booth shipping, drayage, setup orders, lead retrieval rentals

• Coordinate exhibitor services including electricity, Wi-Fi, furniture, and A/V

• Track all show-related deadlines (early bird pricing, badge registrations, shipping cutoffs)

• Build and maintain a tradeshow calendar with cost tracking and ROI notes

• Compile post-show lead lists and initiate follow-up sequences in Method CRM and SalesAPE



Travel Booking & Itinerary Management

• Book domestic and international flights, hotels, rental cars, and ground transportation

• Build detailed travel itineraries with confirmations, maps, and logistics notes 

• Monitor flight changes and proactively rebook when disruptions occur

• Manage loyalty program accounts and maximize points/miles where possible

• Reconcile travel expenses and submit receipts to accounting



Accounting & Finance Support

• Enter vendor bills and purchase orders into QuickBooks Desktop with proper coding

• Reconcile credit card statements against receipts and flag discrepancies

• Process accounts payable — match invoices to POs and route for approval

• Generate and send customer invoices for B2B accounts

• Follow up on past-due receivables with professional collection communications

• Pull reports from QuickBooks as directed (P&L, A/R aging, A/P aging, sales by customer)

• Assist with month-end close tasks and document collection



Inventory Reporting & Management

• Pull and distribute weekly inventory reports across Amazon FBA, Walmart, and warehouse locations

• Monitor FBA reorder points and flag low-stock SKUs ahead of lead time windows

• Track stranded, unsellable, and aged inventory and escalate for action

• Reconcile inventory discrepancies between ShipStation, QuickBooks, and marketplace portals

• Maintain product master data including ASINs, Walmart Item IDs, UPCs, dimensions, and weights

• Assist with IPI score monitoring and FBA storage limit management



CRM & Marketing Operations

• Maintain and update Method CRM: contacts, accounts, activity logs, and pipeline stages

• Build and send
 campaigns in Omnisend per marketing calendar

• Schedule and publish social media content via 
 across
, Instagram, and TikTok

• Pull campaign performance reports (open rates, click rates, conversion data)

• Manage 
 prospect lists: upload, enrich, and sequence contacts

• Respond to Tidio live chat inquiries and escalate when needed

• Assist with content production: resize images, light copy editing, organize Canva assets

• Maintain marketing asset libraries including product photos, logos, and brand files



Administrative & General Operations

• Maintain organized digital filing systems (Google Drive, Dropbox, or equivalent)

• Draft, format, and proofread professional documents, proposals, and reports

• Conduct internet research on competitors, suppliers, pricing, and industry trends

• Manage and renew business subscriptions, licenses, and vendor accounts

• Coordinate with suppliers and vendors on purchase orders, lead times, and quality issues

• Maintain standard operating procedures (SOPs) and update documentation when processes change

• Assist with HR tasks: job postings, candidate screening, interview scheduling

• Handle miscellaneous executive tasks as they arise — this role is dynamic and no two weeks look the same



Tools You Will Work In

Proficiency or fast ramp-up required on:



QuickBooks Desktop - Method CRM - Amazon Seller Central Walmart Seller Central - ShipStation - Omnisend - 
 Loomly -Tidio - Canva - Zapier - Google Workspace (Gmail, Drive, Sheets, Docs) -Microsoft Office (Word, Excel) Zoom / Teams - Slack



What We Are Looking For

Required

• 3+ years of experience as a VA, EA, or online business manager

• Demonstrated experience supporting Amazon FBA/FBM or Walmart Seller Central operations

• Strong written and spoken English — you will communicate directly with U.S. customers, vendors, and partners

• Experience with QuickBooks (Desktop preferred) or equivalent accounting software

• Highly organized with strong attention to detail and follow-through

• Comfortable managing multiple priorities without needing constant supervision

• Reliable high-speed internet, noise-free workspace, and backup power/internet solution

• Available for daily/weekly video check-ins on U.S. Central time

Preferred

• Experience with Method CRM or any CRM platform

• Background in e-commerce, wholesale distribution, or manufacturing

• Familiarity with Amazon case management, reimbursements, and listing troubleshooting

• Tradeshow or event coordination experience

• QuickBooks Desktop (not Online) experience — this is a meaningful differentiator

• Experience building SOPs and process documentation



What Makes Someone Exceptional Here

The best person for this role is not someone who waits to be told what to do next. They proactively identify what needs attention, communicate clearly when something is off track, and consistently follow through without reminders.



We value:

• Ownership mentality — you treat the business like it matters to you

• Proactive communication — you send the update before we ask for it

• Systems thinking — you look for ways to build repeatable processes, not just do tasks once

• Precision — mistakes in orders, invoices, and customer communications are costly; accuracy matters

• Reliability — showing up on time, every time, is non-negotiable



How to Apply

Submit your application through OnlineJobs.ph. In your cover message, please include:

• A brief summary of your most relevant experience for this specific role

• The tools from our stack above that you have hands-on experience with

• One example of a problem you solved proactively for a previous employer — something they did not ask you to fix but you noticed and addressed

• Your current availability and time zone overlap with U.S. Central time



Applications without a personalized cover message will not be reviewed. We read every submission carefully and will respond to qualified candidates within 3 business days.

title: Principal Software Engineer
description:
We are looking for a Principal Software Engineer to take a leading role in building a new, design-led digital platform from the ground up. This is a hands-on role with significant influence over the technical direction of the product, working closely with product and design to bring a high-quality user experience to life.



You will be responsible for shaping the core architecture of the platform, making key decisions around data modelling, API design, and system structure. The role spans the full stack, from implementing a clean and scalable backend to delivering a polished, performant frontend that reflects a considered design system.



A key part of the role is building the platform in a way that is robust from day one. This includes integrating marketplace payments, handling real-time interactions, managing user identity and permissions, and ensuring the system is secure, observable, and able to scale as the product grows.



You will also play a leadership role within a small engineering team, setting standards for code quality, guiding technical decisions, and helping less experienced engineers move quickly without compromising the integrity of the build.



Responsibilities

 • Own the overall technical architecture and system design of the platform

 • Design and implement scalable backend systems, APIs, and data models

 • Build and maintain frontend components aligned with a defined design system

 • Lead integration of key third-party services including payments, messaging, and analytics

 • Ensure high standards for code quality, testing, and performance

 • Establish development workflows, environments, and deployment processes

 • Collaborate closely with product and design to translate requirements into working software

 • Support and guide other engineers, providing technical direction and mentorship

 • Identify and manage technical risks early, particularly around scaling and complexity



Experience and Skills

 • 6+ years professional experience in full-stack development, ideally with modern JavaScript frameworks

 • Strong experience building and shipping production-grade web applications

 • Experience designing APIs and working with relational databases

 • Familiarity with cloud-based architectures and modern backend platforms (e.g. Supabase, Firebase, or similar)

 • Experience integrating third-party services such as payments (Stripe), messaging, or search

 • Strong understanding of application security, authentication, and data protection

 • Comfortable working across both frontend and backend with a focus on delivering complete features

 • Ability to balance speed of delivery with long-term maintainability



Nice to have

 • Experience building marketplace or two-sided platforms

 • Experience with Stripe Connect or similar payment systems

 • Familiarity with real-time systems or messaging platforms

 • Experience working in small, fast-moving product teams

 • Interest in design-led or consumer-facing products



To apply, please send the following:

 1. Total Professional Experience

 2. Number of architected production grade applications 

 3. Approximate number of real users or transactions handled in one application

 4. University and GPA

 5. Expected salary in AUD per hour

 6. Location in Philippines

        7.     Link of your PDF CV in a drive, not your website.



This will be a fully remote role in AEST timezone, with possible travel to Australia one in a while.

title: Virtual Assistant (VA)/Excel EXPERT
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a highly detail-oriented, part-time Virtual Assistant who breathes Excel. This role requires an expert in Excel 365 to handle data processing, business intelligence tasks, and complex financial modeling.



Here is what you will do:



Share Valuation & Financial Modeling: Build a Two-Stage Dividend Discount Model (DDM) to forecast short-run and long-run dividend growth. Calculate estimated share prices and compare them using P/E benchmarking.



Financial Data Sourcing: Extract and aggregate historical financial data, including Earnings Per Share (EPS), cash dividends, actual share prices, and Equity Beta from Yahoo Finance, alongside industry forward P/E ratios.



Advanced Finance Formulas: Apply the Capital Asset Pricing Model (CAPM) using specific risk-free rates and market risk premiums to determine discount rates, and calculate the Present Value (PV) of forecasted dividends and Terminal Value.



Business Intelligence Metrics: Calculate key figures including total spend, gross revenue, VIP customer counts, and dynamically apply discount tiers based on logic rules.



Dynamic Data Functions: Write clean, modern formulas using XLOOKUP, FILTER, LET, and SUMIFS to cross-reference product pricing, VIP status, and transaction line items. Strict rule: No hardcoding and no legacy functions.



Data Quality & Auditing: Set up conditional formatting to highlight missing data (e.g., customer states) and use array logic (such as the -- double unary) to count and manage duplicate transaction numbers and IDs.



you are welcome to use ai to guide through your process





How to Apply:

We skip the long interviews and let your work speak for itself.

If you think you can do it, click the link below and submit a short mini-trial to show us your Excel logic.

Trial instructions

 Here: 



Note: DO NOT APPLY IF YOU ONLY KNOW how to input data on excel. You must know how to use formulas.

I WILL PROVIDE THE FORMULAS WE WILL USE.


 if any questions

title: CRM & Website Support
description:
I am a small business owner in the insurance industry (health, Medicare, and life insurance) based in the United States. I am looking for an experienced technical specialist to help me manage, complete, and improve my CRM system and business website on an ongoing, as-needed basis.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person. I need someone who takes ownership, solves problems at the root level, and communicates clearly — not someone who applies quick fixes and moves on.



 



My CRM is custom-built but not fully completed. I need someone who understands how a CRM should function in a real business — including client tracking, workflows, and integrations with
 and forms.



My website is hosted on Amazon Web Services (AWS) and has experienced repeated downtime. I am currently being charged every time the site needs to be restored, and I need someone who can find the root cause, stabilize the system, and prevent this from happening again.



 



- Audit and evaluate my CRM and website systems

- Complete and improve CRM functionality (data tracking, workflows, automation)

- Set up and manage integrations 
 systems, lead forms, website connections)

- Diagnose and permanently fix website downtime and performance issues

- Improve website security and prevent recurring disruptions

- Manage hosting environment, domains, and DNS settings

- Ensure I have full administrative control over all my systems

- Provide clear documentation and recommendations for long-term stability



 



- Proven experience working with CRM systems in a real business environment

- Strong knowledge of integrations 
 platforms, web forms, automation tools)

- Solid backend website experience (WordPress or similar platforms)

- Experience with AWS or similar hosting platforms

- Knowledge of website security, uptime monitoring, and troubleshooting

- Ability to identify and fix root causes — not just temporary workarounds

- Strong English communication and documentation skills

- Reliable, self-directed, and able to work independently



 



- Fully remote

- Flexible hours, as needed

- Ongoing relationship strongly preferred



**How to Apply**



To be considered, please do ALL of the following:



1. Start your application with the word SYSTEM (applications that do not begin with this word will not be reviewed)

2. Describe your experience with CRM systems and integrations

3. Provide specific examples of systems you have built, fixed, or improved

4. State your hourly rate in USD

5. Submit a **2–5 minute video** explaining:

   - How you would audit a CRM and website

   - How you would troubleshoot repeated website downtime on AWS

   - Your experience with integrations and automation



 



  I need someone I can trust with my systems long-term. If you are experienced, dependable, and take pride in doing things right the first time, I would love to hear from you.

title: Script (Steps) Writer + Screen recorder
description:
Our videos for this role will primarily focus on tutorials, reviews, and step-by-step walkthroughs of SaaS software and digital products.



Your responsibility is to first create a clear, structured set of steps for each video. These steps will then be used to guide your screen recording, where you’ll walk through the software in real time, following the exact flow of the steps.



Here’s an example of how the final step-by-step structure should look: 



You’ll need to break down the entire process into individual steps that will be shown in the video. This includes everything, navigation, buttons clicked, inputs entered, prompts used, and any important on-screen actions. Provide any assets that are generated or relevant to the walkthrough (example: if you generate a video as part of the walkthrough, download the video and provide that with any other assets. Make sure they're labelled to the corresponding step). 



Once completed, send the steps using the same format as the example above. We will then convert your steps into a polished final script for you to use during recording. Example script: 



After receiving the final script, record your screen while going through the tool or course, following the script exactly — as if you’re performing a live walkthrough.



Requirements:

- Excellent attention to detail, you must follow steps exactly with no missed actions

- Understanding of engaging video flow (you know how to structure steps so they make sense and keep the viewer engaged)

- Experience with screen recording tutorials or SaaS walkthroughs is a plus

- Fluent in English with clear communication skills

- Create a separate Chrome profile named “AFFContent” for all recordings. This ensures no personal bookmarks, tabs, or browsing history appear in the video.

- Ensure your screen recording is high quality, smooth, clear, and free from lag.

- Move at a natural pace: don’t rush through steps, but also avoid unnecessary delays.

- Most recordings should fall within the 10–20 minute range, depending on the length of the script.

- Follow the script from beginning to end in the correct order. This is essential, as the editor will sync your footage with a voiceover.

- Reliable, consistent, and responsive



We will provide access to any paid tools or gated content required for the task. Please use resources efficiently and avoid unnecessary usage of credits & generations, or features.



In the subject line of your application include the word "Star" to confirm that you read the whole job description. Thank you.

title: English Teacher
description:
Job Title: Online English Teacher — Group & Private Classes (Full or Part-Time)



Company: My Planet English

Location: Remote (Work from home)

Schedule: Weekdays / Weekends / Both — your choice

Pay: $3–$5/hr depending on class type | Up to $500+/month if doing both



---



ABOUT US



My Planet English is a live online English learning platform with adult students worldwide — 3 live group classes and 1 private session every week. We are building our founding team of teachers right now and want people who are serious, reliable, and love teaching.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



We have two teaching streams and you can apply for one or both:



STREAM A — Weekday Group Classes (Monday to Friday)

- 3 group classes per day, 45 minutes each

- Up to 7 students per class

- 3 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $4.50/hr

- Monthly earnings: ~$270–$300/month



STREAM B — Weekend Private Classes (Saturday and Sunday)

- 10 private 1:1 sessions per day, 30 minutes each

- One student per session

- 5 hours of teaching per day

- Pay: $2.50 per session

- Monthly earnings: ~$200/month



DO BOTH AND EARN MORE

If you are available on both weekdays and weekends, you can take on both streams and earn $470–$500+/month working from home.



---



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES



- Deliver live English classes via our online platform (group or private depending on your stream)

- Follow our curriculum guide and adapt your style to the student level

- Keep sessions engaging, structured, and professional

- Be punctual — our students book in advance and depend on you

- Track basic notes on student progress for continuity



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- Native or near-native English speaker

- Experience teaching English online or in person (any level considered)

- TESOL, TEFL, or CELTA certification is a plus but not required

- Stable internet connection (minimum 10 Mbps)

- Quiet, professional workspace

- Good quality headset and camera

- Warm, energetic, and reliable.



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send your application with the following.



1. A short introduction about your teaching background

2. Which stream you are applying for — Weekday, Weekend, or Both



We are hiring. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

- Recruiting, training, and managing a team of content workers

Tell me briefly about your team setup, your experience managing content production at scale, and any significant projects you've delivered.

title: Full Stack Developer
description:
Aldebaran TC is looking for a Full-Stack Developer (Automation & Systems) to support our internal tools, automation workflows, and existing web platform. 







This role is primarily focused on Python-based development and automation, with additional exposure to full-stack development, databases, and systems support. While the core of the role is development, you’ll also handle occasional cross-functional technical tasks (data, systems, and internal support) to keep operations running smoothly. You will work closely with the Technology Manager on technical initiatives, while contributing across multiple areas of the stack. 







Who We Are:



Aldebaran Threat Consultants (ATC) specializes in security reporting, risk analysis, and bespoke consultancy services for organizations operating in medium- and high-risk environments in the Middle East and Africa.



ATC’s fully integrated suite of services brings together the expertise and local knowledge of our country specialists with the unparalleled granularity of information and the data analysis tools available on the Aldebaran Platform.



In countries where business opportunities and security trends go hand in hand, our holistic approach to risk analysis supports the decision-making of security teams and commercial units via critical forecasting and 24/7 situational awareness. Our tools and services enable data-driven operational planning and security risk mitigation.







The Role:



Develop and maintain in-house automation scripts using Python 

Build tools, scripts, and API/webhook integrations to support business workflows and client requirements 

Work on our existing internal web platform (Django + React + PostgreSQL) by handling minor fixes, incremental improvements, and simple feature enhancements 

Test, troubleshoot and resolve issues across applications, automations, and related systems to ensure reliability and correctness 

Write and execute SQL queries for reporting, data extraction, and automation tasks 

Work with geospatial data files (KML), including creating/editing files (e.g., via Google Earth) and preparing them for compatibility with our web platform 

Occasionally, work on Power BI dashboards in response to specific client requests 

Occasionally, research and evaluate new tech/approaches to improve internal workflows and solutions 

Provide support for internal systems, database-related tasks, and IT issues as part of specific workflows (e.g., basic environment issues, user support, or system checks) 





Core Focus Areas 



This role is primarily focused on: 



? Primary Focus (65–75%): Development — automation, scripting, integrations, and light full-stack work 



? Secondary Focus (25–35%): Systems administration, database querying/operational support, light geospatial/KML data handling, occasional research/evaluation of internal tools/solutions, and internal IT support 







What We’re Looking For: 



? 3–6 years of experience in software development 



? Strong proficiency in Python (automation and backend development) 



? Solid experience with SQL and relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred) 



? Experience working with structured data (JSON, XML, YAML) and third-party APIs and webhooks 



? Ability to troubleshoot across application, database, and system layers 



? Strong communication skills and ability to work independently in a remote environment 







Nice to Have 



? Experience with React and TypeScript 



? Familiarity with Django or similar backend frameworks 



? Experience working on or contributing to existing full-stack web applications 



? Basic systems administration knowledge (Windows/Linux environments) 



? Familiarity with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS) or DevOps practices 



? Familiarity with Power BI or similar data visualization / BI tools 



? Familiarity with geospatial data formats (e.g., KML) or XML-based file structures 







How You’ll Work 



? You’ll collaborate closely with the Technology Manager on system design and technical decisions 



? You’ll have ownership over development tasks, with guidance on infrastructure and systems 



? You’ll be part of a small, flexible team where your contributions have a direct impact 







Why Join Us? 



? Work on meaningful internal systems and automation projects 



? Gain exposure to multiple areas: development, databases, and systems 



? Opportunity to grow into a broader technical role over time 



? Flexible, remote-friendly work environment

title: Chief Financial Officer
description:
Job description



The company is a newly formed, heavily capitalized pharmaceutical joint venture designed to disrupt the Philippine ethical medicine market. Backed by a multi-million initial capitalization from a major manufacturing conglomerate, our mission is to deliver high-quality, FDA-approved medicines to the market through a ruthlessly efficient, direct-to-retail distribution model. We operate on a strict "Lean Team" philosophy—deploying a highly compensated, elite national strike team.



The Mandate

We are not looking for a bookkeeper. We are seeking a Strategic Fiduciary Gatekeeper. The CFO of the company serves as the primary financial architect of the Joint Venture. Your ultimate mandate is to protect the capital runway, enforce extreme budgetary discipline across all commercial operations, manage the multi-million peso supply chain float, and formally secure the Year 3 ROI target that triggers the founders' equity recapitalization.

You will have the absolute authority to say "No" to the CEO, the National Sales Manager, and the JMC if an operational move threatens the financial bridge.



Key Responsibilities

• Capitalization Management: Command the JV capitalization, ensuring strict adherence to the four strategic funding pillars (Pre-Launch OpEx, Trade & Marketing, Initial Inventory, and the Q1 Working Capital Bridge).



• The "85% Penetration Lock" Enforcement: Act as the ultimate gatekeeper for the national media budget. You will audit and verify CRM data and delivery receipts, refusing to release broadcast funds until the commercial team proves an 85% physical distribution penetration in target territories.



• Supply Chain Finance & Float Optimization: Manage the critical Inventory Recorder Float. You will balance 30-to-60 day pharmacy receivables against aggressive manufacturing payment terms to ensure zero stock-outs during the hyper-growth phase.



• Lean Payroll & Fleet Administration: Oversee the financial administration of the national team, including managing the compensation benefits of the employees.



• Boardroom Reporting: Deliver monthly financial health, burn rate, and EBITDA reports to the JMC, providing strategic foresight on tax friction, bank financing, and enterprise valuation modeling.



The Ideal Candidate

• Credentials: CPA is strictly required. MBA or CFA designation is highly preferred.

• Experience: 10+ years in progressive financial leadership roles. Previous experience as a CFO, VP of Finance, or Finance Director in a fast-scaling startup, FMCG, or pharmaceutical manufacturing environment.

• M&A / JV Acumen: Deep understanding of Joint Venture accounting, equity capitalization, ROI payback periods, and dividend distribution modeling.

• The Persona: A highly pragmatic, data-driven leader with unshakeable integrity. You must possess the boardroom presence to present to billionaire investors and the operational grit to optimize warehouse logistics.



TO APPLY

Submit your executive CV and a brief cover letter outlining your experience in managing capitalized ventures to: 
 or message/call

title: Recruitment Expert
description:
# Recruitment Agent — Source High-Quality Video Talent (AI Creators & Editors)



**Hourly Rate + $100 Commission Per Successful Hire**



We're looking for a driven recruitment agent to help us find and vet top-tier video talent on an ongoing basis. You'll be paid your hourly rate plus a $100 USD bonus for every successful hire you bring us.



---



## What You'll Be Doing



You'll source, engage, and screen candidates for two types of roles, then send us only the best. We do NOT want to interview low-quality applicants — your job is to be the quality filter.



**Your responsibilities:**

- Find candidates through job boards, communities, freelance platforms, social media, and your own network

- Review their portfolios carefully against the criteria below

- Have a conversation with each candidate to confirm their skills, availability, and interest

- Submit only vetted, high-quality candidates to us with a short summary and portfolio links



---



## Role 1: AI Video Content Creator



We need creators who work with AI video generation tools and produce polished, creative output — not just raw AI dumps.



**Required:**

- Hands-on experience with Seedance, Nano Banana, or similar AI video generation tools

- Familiarity with other AI tools (Runway, Pika, Kling, Midjourney, etc.) is a plus

- Strong prompt engineering skills and ability to refine AI outputs to a high standard

- Good eye for storytelling, pacing, and visual composition



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 completed AI-generated video projects

- Evidence of creative direction (not just default outputs)

- Quality refinement and iteration on AI-generated content



---



## Role 2: Professional Video Editor



We need editors who can deliver polished, professional-grade video across formats.



**Required:**

- Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, Final Cut Pro, or Avid Media Composer

- Solid skills in colour grading, audio mixing, transitions, and motion graphics

- Experience editing for social media (Reels, TikTok, Shorts) and/or long-form content

- Ability to work from briefs and hit deadlines



**Portfolio must show:**

- At least 3 professionally edited video projects

- Variety of styles or formats (social, commercial, narrative, etc.)

- Clean technique, good pacing, and polished audio/visuals



---



## Compensation



- **Hourly rate** — tell us your rate based on your experience

- **Plus $100 USD bonus per successful hire** — no cap on placements

- Bonuses paid upon candidate acceptance and confirmation

- Ongoing engagement with room to grow



---



## Do NOT Send Us



- Candidates with generic or low-effort demo reels

- Portfolios of unedited, raw AI outputs with no refinement

- Editors whose only experience is with basic tools like iMovie or CapCut

- Anyone who can't demonstrate real, hands-on use of the required tools

- Applicants who can't communicate clearly or follow a brief



---



## To Apply



Tell us:

1. A brief intro about your recruiting experience, especially in creative/video talent

2. Examples of past placements or sourcing work (if available)

3. Your preferred sourcing channels and methods

4. Your hourly rate



We're looking for agents who take quality seriously. If that's you, we'd love to work together.

- Basic Troubleshooting: Perform basic troubleshooting for IT systems and services to ensure everything runs smoothly.

- User Setup Assistance: Assist with user setup, including creating accounts, configuring devices, and ensuring appropriate access levels.

- Documentation and Procedures: Follow documentation and procedures to ensure consistency and accuracy in project tasks.

- Task Coordination: Coordinate with senior technicians and project managers to ensure all tasks are completed on time.

- Issue Reporting: Report any issues or challenges encountered during project work to senior tea
mbers.

- Client Communication: Assist with client communications, gathering requirements, and providing basic training as needed.

- Documentation of Work: Document all work performed, ensuring that all systems are properly labeled and inventory is updated.

- Project Reviews Participation: Participate in project reviews and contribute suggestions for improvements in processes or systems.

Qualifications:

- Proven experience in IT support or a related field.

- Strong technical acumen and problem-solving abilities.

- Excellent communication skills (verbal and written) to explain technical concepts to non- technical users.

- Basic understanding of computer hardware, software, and network troubleshooting.

- Ability to multitask and prioritize tasks effectively.

- Strong organizational skills and attention to detail.

- Positive attitude and a customer service orientation.

- Willingness to learn and grow within the role. Working Hours and Timekeeping:

- Scheduled to work during USA - Pacific (PST) time zones, 8am-5pm.

- Keep track of time via Timeproof.

- Be a part of the company, not just a virtual assistant.

- Desire to grow personally, professionally, and financially.

How to Apply:

Interested applicants are requested to
 their updated resume along with a brief cover letter and video intro detailing their relevant experience to 
 use the subject line: "Project Technician - [Your Full Name]".

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your interest and thank all applicants in advance.

title: IT Systems Administrator (Part-Time with Growth Potential)
description:
Are you passionate about IT and looking to grow with a team that truly values your skills? We’re a US-based Managed Service Provider (MSP) that works closely with small businesses to provide them with top-notch IT solutions. Our goal is simple: help our clients succeed with smooth, reliable technology support.

We’re excited to bring on an IT Systems and Projects Administrator who’s eager to make a real impact by managing networks, firewalls, desktops, servers and projects for our fantastic clients. This is an opportunity with huge potential for growth. Start part-time, and as you grow with us, there’s the possibility of moving into a full-time role. If you’re looking for flexibility, some evening and weekend work may also be available.

What You’ll Be Doing:

Managing client networks, firewalls, desktops, servers, and overseeing IT projects.

Troubleshooting technical issues and keeping systems running smoothly.

Implementing best practices for security and data protection.

Collaborating directly with small business clients to provide exceptional IT support.

Leading and contributing to IT projects that drive efficiency and improvement.

Who We’re Looking For:

If you’ve got experience in any of the following areas, we’d love to hear from you!

Operating Systems: Windows 10-11, MacOS, Windows Server

Virtualization: HyperV Server

Cloud Platforms: Azure, AWS

Firewalls: Cato, Sophos, Sonicwall

Backup and Disaster Recovery: Acronis, Axcient BCDR

Networking: Ubiquiti Unifi, DNS, DHCP, VPN

Antivirus: Bitdefender, Sophos, SentinelOne

Bonus Points: Project management experience is highly valued!

Why Join Us?

Room for Growth: Start part-time and grow into a full-time role as your responsibilities expand.

Flexibility: Evening and weekend work is available to fit your schedule.

Supportive Team: Join a US-based IT team that’s here to help you grow and succeed.

Ready to Apply? Here’s How!

We want to get to know you! Along with your resume, send us a brief video introduction. We love seeing the person behind the skills! Tell us about your IT background, experience, and your availability. We’ll give extra attention to applications with a video introduction.

Send your resume and video intro to 
 excited to meet you!

title: Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions)
description:
Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions)

Department: Service Team

Projected Shift Schedule: 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM

Dispatch Hours: 9:00 AM – 1:00 PM (During onboarding training for 60 days)

Salary: $5

Role Overview

We are seeking a Tier 1 Technician (with Web Support Functions) to join our Service Team. This hybrid role primarily focuses on Tier 1 technical support while contributing to web development initiatives. The ideal candidate is a versatile problem-solver who thrives in IT support and has a foundational understanding of web development.

You will primarily provide Tier 1 service desk support and assist with website maintenance and updates.

Key Responsibilities

Service Desk & Technical Support (80%)

Act as the first point of contact for technical issues via HaloPSA,
, and phone.

Provide Tier 1 troubleshooting for user issues (hardware, software, and connectivity).

Create, assign, and manage tickets; escalate as needed to higher tiers.

Maintain service notes, documentation, and ensure SLA compliance.

Coordinate dispatch between clients and higher-tier technicians.

Web Development Support (20%)

Update and maintain company websites (WordPress or similar CMS).

Implement layout and style improvements following brand guidelines.

Support internal web portal and knowledge base enhancement initiatives.

Required Skills

Technical Skills

Experience in IT Service Desk or Tier 1 support environment.

Strong troubleshooting skills for Windows, macOS, and Office 365.

Familiarity with ticketing systems (HaloPSA or equivalent).

Proficiency in WordPress (content editing, plugin configuration, page layout).

Basic understanding of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Knowledge of domain/DNS management and hosting basics.

Soft Skills

Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.

High attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

Strong time management and multitasking abilities.

Adaptable and proactive in both technical and web tasks.

Preferred Qualifications

1–2 years of experience in IT or Service Desk roles with exposure to web work.

Experience in an MSP or IT support environment.

Coursework or certification in Web Development or related fields.

Experience maintaining or building WordPress-based websites.

Suggested Training / Certifications

Technical:

CompTIA A+ / Network+

Microsoft 365 Fundamentals (MS-900)

WordPress Development Fundamentals

ITIL Foundation

Web Development:

Basic HTML, CSS, JavaScript

WordPress Design and Layout Best Practices

How to Apply

Interested applicants are requested to
 their updated resume along with a brief cover letter and video intro detailing their relevant experience to 
 and use the subject line:

"Tier 1 Technician - [Your Full Name]".

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. We appreciate your interest and thank all applicants in advance.
